31503.title: Keep your Enemies Closer: Strategic Platform Adjustments during U.S. and French Elections
31503.zh_title: 亲近你的敌人：美国与法国选举中的战略平台调整
31503.authors: Rafael Di Tella, Randy Kotti, Caroline Le Pennec, Vincent Pons
31503.abstract: We study changes in political discourse during campaigns, using a novel dataset of candidate websites for U.S. House elections, 2002-2016, and manifestos for French parliamentary and local elections, 1958-2022. We find that candidates move to the center in ideology and rhetorical complexity between the first round (or primary) and the second round (or general election). This convergence reflects candidates’ strategic adjustment to their competitor, as predicted by the median voter theorem: Using an RDD, we show that candidates converge to the platform of opponents who narrowly qualified for the last round, as opposed to those who narrowly failed to qualify.
31503.zh_abstract: 我们利用2002年至2016年美国众议院选举候选人网站的新数据集，以及1958年至2022年法国议会和地方选举的宣言，研究了竞选期间政治话语的变化。我们发现，候选人在第一轮（或初选）和第二轮（或大选）之间在意识形态和修辞复杂性上向中间立场移动。这种趋同反映了候选人根据竞争对手进行的战略调整，正如中位选民定理所预测的那样：利用断点回归设计，我们表明候选人会向那些勉强有资格进入最后一轮的对手的平台趋同，而不是那些勉强未能有资格的对手。

31502.title: Financial Machine Learning
31502.abstract: We survey the nascent literature on machine learning in the study of financial markets. We highlight the best examples of what this line of research has to offer and recommend promising directions for future research. This survey is designed for both financial economists interested in grasping machine learning tools, as well as for statisticians and machine learners seeking interesting financial contexts where advanced methods may be deployed.
31502.zh_abstract: 我们综述了机器学习在金融市场研究中的新兴文献。我们重点展示了这一研究方向的最佳案例，并为未来研究推荐了有前景的方向。本综述旨在服务于两类读者：一是希望掌握机器学习工具的经济金融学者，二是寻求有趣金融场景以应用先进方法的统计学家和机器学习从业者。
31502.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：C33, C4, C45, C55, C58, G1, G10, G11, G12, G17

31501.title: Constitutions and Order: A Theory and Evidence from Colombia and the United States
31501.zh_title: 宪法与秩序：来自哥伦比亚和美国的理论与证据
31501.authors: Leopoldo Fergusson, Javier Mejia, James A. Robinson, Santiago Torres
31501.abstract: We propose a framework to explain why some societies may end up with different constitutional solutions to the problem of maintaining order in the face of self-interested behavior. Though the salient intellectual tradition since Hobbes has focused on how institutional design is used to eradicate violence, our framework illustrates that equilibrium constitutions may in fact have to deliberately allow for violence. This arises because some societies are unable to use institutions to influence income distribution. In this case, a constitutional tolerance of violence emerges as a credible way for an incumbent to meet the participation constraint of a challenger. We illustrate the results with the comparative constitutional history of the US and Colombia.
31501.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个框架，用以解释为何不同社会在应对自利行为以维持秩序时，可能最终采用不同的宪法解决方案。尽管自霍布斯以来，主流学术传统聚焦于如何通过制度设计消除暴力，但我们的框架表明，均衡宪法实际上可能不得不故意允许暴力存在。这是因为某些社会无法利用制度来影响收入分配。在这种情况下，宪法对暴力的容忍成为在位者可信地满足挑战者参与约束的一种方式。我们通过美国和哥伦比亚的宪法史比较来阐释这些结果。

31500.title: The Decentralization of Liquor Policies in Texas during the Post-Prohibition Era
31500.zh_title: 后禁酒令时期得克萨斯州酒类政策的分权化
31500.abstract: We examine the decentralization of liquor policies in Texas during the Post-Prohibition era using newly collected historical legislative roll call data. By combining these data with local referendum vote shares, we analyze both legislators’ and constituents’ preferences on liquor policy. We develop a probabilistic voting model incorporating spillovers and peer effects. Results reveal substantial heterogeneity in preferences among voters, reflecting differing attitudes toward alcohol regulation. Spillover effects are significant, yet the model predicts notable gains from decentralization. Finally, we link legislators’ policy preferences to alcohol consumption data and compare model-based welfare estimates with traditional consumption-based measures.
31500.zh_abstract: 我们利用新收集的历史立法投票记录数据，研究了后禁酒令时期得克萨斯州酒类政策的分权化。通过将这些数据与地方公投得票率相结合，我们分析了立法者和选民在酒类政策上的偏好。我们构建了一个包含溢出效应和同伴效应的概率投票模型。结果显示，选民偏好存在显著异质性，反映了对酒精监管的不同态度。溢出效应显著，但模型预测分权化能带来显著收益。最后，我们将立法者的政策偏好与酒精消费数据联系起来，并将基于模型的福利估计与传统基于消费的衡量指标进行比较。

31518.title: Is This Time Different? The Safety Net Response to the Pandemic Recession
31518.zh_title: 这次不同吗？疫情衰退中的安全网应对
31518.authors: Erik A. Hembre, Robert A. Moffitt, James P. Ziliak
31518.abstract: The federal government enacted massive spending in the Pandemic Recession. But was this spending scaled to the magnitude of the economic downturn? We examine the responsiveness of the safety net to the Pandemic Recession and compare it to that in the Great Recession. Using monthly state-level administrative caseload data from five large transfer programs–SNAP, TANF, Medicaid, SSI, and UI–and measuring responsiveness in the conventional way as the state-level caseload response to cross-state variation in measures of the business cycle–we find that the safety net response during the Pandemic Recession was greater than occurred during the Great Recession for the most important recessionary-relief programs–UI and SNAP. But we find that the two smaller programs, TANF and SSI, were less responsive during the Pandemic, and we find that Medicaid caseloads are generally unresponsive to the business cycle. We also consider the role of Pandemic state-level policies, such as school and business closures, on caseloads, finding that states with more strict government Pandemic policies had greater caseload increases.
31518.zh_abstract: 联邦政府在疫情衰退期间实施了大规模支出。但这种支出是否与经济衰退的严重程度相匹配？我们考察了安全网对疫情衰退的响应性，并将其与大衰退期间的响应性进行比较。利用来自五个大型转移项目——SNAP、TANF、Medicaid、SSI和UI——的月度州级行政案件量数据，并以传统方式衡量响应性，即州级案件量对商业周期跨州变化的反应，我们发现，在最重要的衰退救济项目——UI和SNAP中，疫情衰退期间的安全网响应大于大衰退期间。但我们发现，两个较小的项目TANF和SSI在疫情期间响应性较低，并且我们发现Medicaid案件量通常对商业周期不敏感。我们还考虑了疫情州级政策（如学校和商业关闭）对案件量的作用，发现政府疫情政策更严格的州，案件量增加更多。

31517.title: Measuring Economic Growth with a Fully Identified Three-Signal Model
31517.zh_title: 使用完全识别的三信号模型衡量经济增长
31517.authors: Andrea Civelli, Arya Gaduh, Ahmed Sadek Yousuf
31517.abstract: We augment Henderson et al. (2012)’s two-signal model of true GDP growth with a third signal to overcome its under-identification problem. The additional moment conditions from the third signal help fully identify all model parameters without ad-hoc calibrations of the GDP’s signal-to-noise ratio. We characterize the necessary properties of the third signal. Using the model, we recover the optimal weight of official GDP in the composite true GDP growth estimates, which varies with the quality of the national statistics. The model improves on existing methodologies that use signals to measure true income.
31517.zh_abstract: 我们在Henderson等人（2012）的真实GDP增长双信号模型基础上增加第三个信号，以克服其欠识别问题。来自第三个信号的额外矩条件有助于完全识别所有模型参数，无需对GDP的信噪比进行特设校准。我们刻画了第三个信号的必要性质。利用该模型，我们恢复了官方GDP在复合真实GDP增长估计中的最优权重，该权重随国家统计质量的变化而变化。该模型改进了现有使用信号衡量真实收入的方法。

31516.title: Understanding Rationality and Disagreement in House Price Expectations
31516.zh_title: 理解房价预期中的理性与分歧
31516.authors: Zigang Li, Stijn Van Nieuwerburgh, Wang Renxuan
31516.abstract: Professional house price forecast data are consistent with a rational model where agents must learn about the parameters of the house price growth process and the underlying state of the housing market. Slow learning about the long-run mean can generate forecast bias, a response of forecasts to lagged realizations, sluggish response of forecasts to contemporaneous realizations, and over-reaction to forecast revisions. Introducing behavioral biases, either over-confidence or diagnostic expectations, helps the model further improve its predictions for short-horizon over-reaction and dispersion. Using panel data for a cross-section of forecasters and a term structure of forecasts are important for generating these results.
31516.zh_abstract: 专业房价预测数据与一个理性模型一致，在该模型中，代理人必须学习房价增长过程的参数以及住房市场的潜在状态。对长期均值的缓慢学习可能导致预测偏差、预测对滞后实现值的响应、预测对同期实现值的迟钝响应以及对预测修正的过度反应。引入行为偏差，无论是过度自信还是诊断性预期，都有助于模型进一步改善其对短期过度反应和离散度的预测。使用跨截面预测者的面板数据和预测的期限结构对于产生这些结果至关重要。
31516.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：E37, E7, G40, G50, R32

31515.title: Working from Home, Worker Sorting and Development
31515.zh_title: 居家办公、工人分类与发展
31515.authors: David Atkin, Antoinette Schoar, Sumit Shinde
31515.abstract: Differences in the productivity of home-based versus office-based work may arise due to a treatment effect of the office or from workers with different abilities sorting into these locations. We conduct an RCT in the data entry sector in India that exogenously allocates workers to work from home (WFH) or from the office. We first find that the productivity of workers randomly assigned to WFH is 18% lower than those in the office. Two-thirds of the effect manifests itself from the first day of work with the remainder due to quicker learning in the office. Second, there is a negative selection effect into the office, since workers who prefer home-based work are 12% faster and more accurate at baseline. Finally, we find negative selection on treatment effects: workers who prefer WFH are substantially less productive at home than the office (27% less compared to 13% less for workers who prefer the office). These negative selection effects are partially explained by subgroups that face bigger constraints on selecting into office work and additional demands on their attention when at home, such as those with children or other home care responsibilities.
31515.zh_abstract: 居家办公与办公室办公的生产率差异可能源于办公室的处理效应，也可能源于不同能力的工人选择进入这些工作地点。我们在印度的数据录入行业进行了一项随机对照试验，将工人外生地分配到居家办公或办公室办公。我们首先发现，随机分配到居家办公的工人生产率比办公室办公低18%。其中三分之二的影响从工作的第一天起就显现出来，其余部分则源于办公室中更快的学习。其次，存在负向的办公室选择效应，因为偏好居家办公的工人在基线时速度快12%且更准确。最后，我们发现处理效应存在负向选择：偏好居家办公的工人在家中的生产率远低于办公室（比偏好办公室的工人低27% vs 13%）。这些负向选择效应部分可由那些在选择办公室工作方面面临更大限制、以及在家中有额外注意力需求的子群体（例如有孩子或其他家庭照护责任的人）来解释。
31515.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, LS, PR；JEL：J01, J10, J22, J24, J46

31514.title: Information Dynamics and Macro Fluctuations
31514.authors: Kyriakos T. Chousakos, Gary B. Gorton, Guillermo Ordoñez
31514.abstract: The amount of information produced about firms’ productivities and about the quality of collateral backing their loans varies over time. These information dynamics determine the evolution of credit, output and productivity, which feeds back into incentives to produce information. We characterize this intricate dynamic relation. A credit boom happens when information about collateral depreciates. A financial crisis happens when information about collateral is suddenly generated. Information about firms’ individual productivities over credit booms can prevent or tame the crisis, acting as an endogenous macroprudential force.
31514.zh_abstract: 关于企业生产率以及作为其贷款抵押品质量的担保品质量的信息生产量随时间变化。这些信息动态决定了信贷、产出和生产率的变化，而这又反馈到信息生产的激励上。我们刻画了这种复杂的动态关系。当关于担保品的信息贬值时，信贷繁荣发生。当关于担保品的信息突然产生时，金融危机发生。在信贷繁荣期间，关于企业个体生产率的信息可以预防或缓解危机，起到内生宏观审慎力量的作用。
31514.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME, PR；JEL：E32, E44, G01

31513.title: Global Transportation Decarbonization
31513.abstract: A number of policy proposals call for replacing fossil fuels in the name of decarbonization, but these fuels will be difficult to replace due to to their as-yet unrivaled bundle of attributes: abundance, ubiquity, energy density, transportability and cost. There is a growing commitment to electrification as the dominant decarbonization pathway for transportation. While deep electrification is promising for road vehicles in wealthy countries, it will face steep obstacles. In other sectors and in the developing world, it’s not even in pole position. Global transportation decarbonization will require decoupling emissions from economic growth, and decoupling emissions from growth will require not only new technologies, but cooperation in governance. The menu of policy options is replete with tradeoffs, particularly as the primacy of energy security and reliability (over emissions abatement) has once again been demonstrated in Europe and elsewhere.
31513.zh_abstract: 许多政策提案以脱碳为名呼吁替代化石燃料，但这些燃料因其至今无与伦比的属性组合——丰富性、普遍性、能量密度、可运输性和成本——而难以被替代。人们越来越致力于将电气化作为交通脱碳的主要路径。虽然深度电气化在富裕国家的道路车辆方面前景广阔，但它将面临严峻障碍。在其他行业以及发展中国家，它甚至不处于领先地位。全球交通脱碳需要将排放与经济增长脱钩，而将排放与增长脱钩不仅需要新技术，还需要治理合作。政策选项菜单充满了权衡取舍，尤其是在欧洲和其他地方再次证明了能源安全和可靠性（相对于减排）的首要地位之后。

31512.title: The (Lack of) Anticipatory Effects of the Social Safety Net on Human Capital Investment
31512.zh_title: 社会安全网对人力资本投资的（缺乏）预期效应
31512.abstract: How does the expectation that a child will receive government benefits in adulthood affect parental investments in the child's human capital? Most parents whose children receive Supplemental Security Income (SSI) benefits overestimate the likelihood that their child will receive SSI benefits in adulthood. We present randomly-selected families with the predicted likelihood that their child will receive SSI benefits in adulthood. Reducing parents' expectations that children will receive benefits in adulthood does not increase investments in children's human capital. This zero effect is precisely estimated. Likely explanations include parents working more themselves, non-financial goals influencing investment, and families facing investment constraints.
31512.zh_abstract: 预期孩子成年后能获得政府福利如何影响父母对孩子人力资本的投资？大多数其子女领取补充保障收入（SSI）福利的父母高估了孩子成年后领取SSI福利的可能性。我们向随机选择的家庭提供其孩子成年后领取SSI福利的预测概率。降低父母对孩子成年后能领取福利的预期并不会增加对孩子人力资本的投资。这一零效应被精确估计。可能的解释包括父母自身增加工作、非财务目标影响投资以及家庭面临投资约束。
31512.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：H20, I20, I3

31511.title: Scenario Sampling for Large Supermodular Games
31511.zh_title: 大型超模博弈的情景抽样
31511.abstract: This paper introduces a simulation algorithm for evaluating the log-likelihood function of a large supermodular binary-action game. Covered examples include (certain types of) peer effect, technology adoption, strategic network formation, and multi-market entry games. More generally, the algorithm facilitates simulated maximum likelihood (SML) estimation of games with large numbers of players, T, and/or many binary actions per player, M (e.g., games with tens of thousands of strategic actions, TM=O(10⁴)). In such cases the likelihood of the observed pure strategy combination is typically (i) very small and (ii) a TM-fold integral who region of integration has a complicated geometry. Direct numerical integration, as well as accept-reject Monte Carlo integration, are computationally impractical in such settings. In contrast, we introduce a novel importance sampling algorithm which allows for accurate likelihood simulation with modest numbers of simulation draws.
31511.zh_abstract: 本文介绍了一种用于评估大型超模二元行动博弈对数似然函数的模拟算法。涵盖的例子包括（某些类型的）同伴效应、技术采用、策略网络形成和多市场进入博弈。更一般地，该算法有助于对具有大量参与者T和/或每个参与者大量二元行动M的博弈进行模拟最大似然估计（例如，具有数万个策略行动TM=O(10⁴)的博弈）。在这种情况下，观察到的纯策略组合的似然通常（i）非常小，并且（ii）是一个TM重积分，其积分区域具有复杂的几何形状。直接数值积分以及接受-拒绝蒙特卡洛积分在此类设置中在计算上不可行。相比之下，我们引入了一种新颖的重要性抽样算法，该算法允许使用适度的模拟抽取次数进行准确的似然模拟。
31511.meta: Programs：ED, IO, LS, PE, TWP；JEL：C15, C31, C55, C7

31510.title: Information Aggregation in Stratified Societies
31510.zh_title: 分层社会中的信息聚合
31510.authors: Marina Agranov, Ran Eilat, Konstantin Sonin
31510.abstract: We analyze a model of political competition in which the elite forms endogenously to aggregate information and advise the uninformed median voter which candidate to choose. The median voter knows whether or not the endorsed candidate is biased toward the elites, but might still prefer the biased candidate if the elite’s endorsement provides sufficient information about her competence. The elite size and the degree of information aggregation by the elite depend on the extent to which the median voter follows the elite’s advice. A higher cost of redistribution minimizes the elite’s information advantage, hinders information transmission, and decreases the expected competence of the elected politician.
31510.zh_abstract: 我们分析了一个政治竞争模型，其中精英阶层内生形成，以聚合信息并告知信息不足的中位选民应选择哪位候选人。中位选民知道被支持的候选人是否偏向精英阶层，但如果精英阶层的支持提供了关于其能力的充分信息，中位选民可能仍会偏好这位有偏见的候选人。精英阶层的规模及其信息聚合程度取决于中位选民遵循精英建议的程度。更高的再分配成本会最小化精英阶层的信息优势，阻碍信息传递，并降低当选政治家的预期能力。

31509.title: The Pervasive Influence of Ideology at the Federal Circuit Courts
31509.zh_title: 意识形态在联邦巡回法院中的普遍影响
31509.abstract: This paper seeks to contribute to the long-standing debate on the extent to which the ideology of federal circuit court judges, as proxied by the party of the president nominating them, can help to predict case outcomes. To this end, I combine and analyze a novel dataset containing about 670,000 circuit court cases from 1985 to 2020. I show that the political affiliation of judges is associated with outcomes, and thus can help to predict them, throughout the vast universe of circuit court cases – and not only in the ideologically contested cases on which prior empirical research has focused.
31509.zh_abstract: 本文旨在为关于联邦巡回法院法官意识形态（以提名他们的总统所属政党作为代理变量）在多大程度上有助于预测案件结果的长期辩论做出贡献。为此，我整合并分析了一个包含1985年至2020年约67万件巡回法院案件的新数据集。我表明，法官的政治派别与案件结果相关，因此有助于预测结果，这适用于整个巡回法院案件的广泛领域——而不仅仅是在先前实证研究关注的意识形态争议案件中。
31509.meta: Programs：LE, PE, POL；JEL：D72, J15, J16, K0

31508.title: Optimal Monetary Policy with r*<0
31508.zh_title: r*<0条件下的最优货币政策
31508.authors: Roberto M. Billi, Jordi Galí, Anton Nakov
31508.abstract: We study the optimal monetary policy problem in a New Keynesian economy with a zero lower bound (ZLB) on the nominal interest rate, when the steady state natural rate (r*) becomes permanently negative. We show that the optimal policy aims to approach gradually a new steady state with positive average inflation. Around that steady state, the optimal policy implies well defined (second-best) paths for inflation and output in response to shocks to the natural rate. Under plausible calibrations, the optimal policy implies that the nominal rate remains at its ZLB most of the time. Despite the latter feature, the central bank can implement the optimal outcome as a unique equilibrium by means of an appropriate nonlinear interest rate rule. In order to establish that result, we derive sufficient conditions for local determinacy in a general model with endogenous regime switches.
31508.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在名义利率存在零下限（ZLB）且稳态自然利率（r*）永久为负的新凯恩斯经济中的最优货币政策问题。我们表明，最优政策旨在逐步趋近一个具有正平均通胀率的新稳态。在该稳态附近，最优政策针对自然利率冲击定义了明确的通胀和产出路径（次优路径）。在合理的校准下，最优政策意味着名义利率大部分时间保持在零下限。尽管存在这一特征，中央银行可以通过适当的非线性利率规则将最优结果作为唯一均衡实施。为了确立这一结果，我们推导了具有内生制度切换的一般模型中局部确定性的充分条件。

31507.title: Information and the Formation of Inflation Expectations by Firms: Evidence from a Survey of Israeli Firms
31507.zh_title: 信息与企业通胀预期的形成：来自以色列企业调查的证据
31507.authors: Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Rafi Melnick, Ari Kutai
31507.abstract: This study analyzes how firms form their inflation expectations during a regime change in monetary policy and a transition to a low-inflation environment. Using the Bank of Israel survey of firms, we document the basic properties of firms’ inflation expectations and examine how Israeli firms update their inflation expectations after receiving new information about inflation or monetary policy. We find that even after successful de-dollarization and disinflation a positive inflation surprise leads to a sizable upward adjustment in inflation expectations for the next year and quarter. A surprise hike in the monetary interest rate leads to a downward adjustment in inflation expectations.
31507.zh_abstract: 本研究分析了企业在货币政策制度变迁和向低通胀环境过渡期间如何形成通胀预期。利用以色列银行的企业调查，我们记录了企业通胀预期的基本特征，并考察了以色列企业在收到关于通胀或货币政策的新信息后如何更新其通胀预期。我们发现，即使在成功的去美元化和反通胀之后，正向的通胀意外也会导致对下一年和下一季度通胀预期的显著上调。货币利率的意外上调则导致通胀预期的下调。

31506.title: Strategyproofness-Exposing Descriptions of Matching Mechanisms
31506.zh_title: 匹配机制的策略证明性揭示描述
31506.authors: Yannai A. Gonczarowski, Ori Heffetz, Clayton Thomas
31506.abstract: A menu description exposes strategyproofness by presenting a mechanism to player i in two steps. Step (1) uses others’ reports to describe i’s menu of potential outcomes. Step (2) uses i’s report to select i’s favorite outcome from her menu. We provide novel menu descriptions of the Deferred Acceptance (DA) and Top Trading Cycles (TTC) matching mechanisms. For TTC, our description additionally yields a proof of the strategyproofness of TTC’s traditional description, in a way that we prove is impossible for DA.
31506.zh_abstract: 菜单描述通过两步向参与者i揭示策略证明性。步骤（1）利用他人的报告来描述i的潜在结果菜单。步骤（2）利用i的报告从她的菜单中选择其最偏好的结果。我们提供了延迟接受（DA）和顶级交易循环（TTC）匹配机制的新颖菜单描述。对于TTC，我们的描述还提供了TTC传统描述策略证明性的证明，而我们证明这种方式对于DA是不可能的。

31505.title: Measuring Financial Integration: More Data, More Countries, More Expectations
31505.zh_title: 衡量金融一体化：更多数据、更多国家、更多预期
31505.abstract: We assess market mediated financial integration over the last fifty years. We first systematically lay out several definitions of financial integration, and then review the evidence regarding whether covered interest parity, uncovered interest parity, and real interest parity hold across industrial and non-industrial countries. Finally we examine what the determinants of real interest differentials are.
31505.zh_abstract: 我们评估了过去五十年中市场中介的金融一体化。我们首先系统地阐述了金融一体化的几种定义，然后回顾了关于覆盖利率平价、无抛补利率平价和实际利率平价在工业国家和非工业国家是否成立的证据。最后，我们考察了实际利率差异的决定因素。

31504.title: Learning and Expectations in Dynamic Spatial Economies
31504.zh_title: 动态空间经济中的学习与预期
31504.authors: Jingting Fan, Sungwan Hong, Fernando Parro
31504.abstract: The impact of shocks in dynamic environments depends on how forward-looking agents anticipate the path of future fundamentals that shape their decisions. We incorporate ﬂexible beliefs about future fundamentals into a general class of dynamic spatial models, allowing beliefs to be evolving, uncertain, and heterogeneous across groups of agents. We show how to implement our methodology to study both ex-ante and ex-post shocks to fundamentals. We apply our method to two settings: an ex-ante study of the economic impacts of climate change, and an ex-post evaluation of the China productivity shock on the U.S. economy. In both cases, we study the impact of deviations from perfect foresight on different outcomes.
31504.zh_abstract: 动态环境中冲击的影响取决于前瞻性主体如何预期塑造其决策的未来基本面路径。我们将关于未来基本面的灵活信念纳入一类通用的动态空间模型中，允许信念随时间演变、具有不确定性，并在不同主体群体间存在异质性。我们展示了如何实施我们的方法来研究基本面的事前和事后冲击。我们将方法应用于两个场景：气候变化经济影响的事前研究，以及中国生产率冲击对美国经济的事后评估。在这两种情况下，我们研究了偏离完美预见对不同结果的影响。
31504.meta: Programs：ITI；JEL：F1, F11, F16, F18, Q54, R11, R13

31542.title: Who Benefits from Remote Schooling? Self-Selection and Match Effects
31542.zh_title: 谁从远程教育中受益？自我选择与匹配效应
31542.authors: Jesse M. Bruhn, Christopher Campos, Eric Chyn, Anh Tran
31542.abstract: We study the distributional effects of remote learning using a novel approach that combines preference data from a conjoint survey experiment with administrative student records. The experimentally derived preference data allow us to account for selection into remote learning while also studying selection patterns and treatment effect heterogeneity. We validate the approach using random variation from school choice lotteries. Our analysis of the average impacts of remote learning finds negative effects on reading (–0.13σ) and math (–0.14σ) achievement. Notably, we find evidence of positive learning effects for children whose parents have the strongest demand for remote learning. Parental concerns related to bullying appear to be an important driver of the demand for remote learning. Moreover, we find that across-the-board positive impacts of remote learning on bullying outcomes operate as a compensating differential for negative impacts on learning. Our results suggest that an important subset of students who currently sort into post-pandemic remote learning benefit from expanded choice.
31542.zh_abstract: 我们利用一种结合联合调查实验偏好数据与行政学生记录的新方法，研究远程学习的分配效应。实验得出的偏好数据使我们能够解释远程学习的自我选择，同时研究选择模式和处理效应异质性。我们利用择校抽签产生的随机变异验证了该方法。对远程学习平均影响的分析发现，其对阅读成绩（-0.13σ）和数学成绩（-0.14σ）有负面效应。值得注意的是，我们发现对于父母对远程学习需求最强的儿童，存在积极的学习效应。与欺凌相关的家长担忧似乎是远程学习需求的重要驱动因素。此外，我们发现远程学习对欺凌结果的全面积极影响，作为对学习负面影响的补偿性差异发挥作用。我们的结果表明，在疫情后时期选择远程学习的学生中，有一个重要的子集从扩大的选择中受益。

31541.title: Accelerating Innovation Ecosystems: The Promise and Challenges of Regional Innovation Engines
31541.zh_title: 加速创新生态系统：区域创新引擎的前景与挑战
31541.authors: Jorge Guzman, Fiona Murray, Scott Stern, Heidi L. Williams
31541.abstract: Motivated by the establishment of major U.S. Federal programs seeking to harness the potential of regional innovation ecosystems, we assess the promise and challenges of place-based innovation policy interventions. Relative to traditional research grants, place-based innovation policy interventions are not directed toward a specific research project but rather aim to reshape interactions among researchers and other stakeholders within a given geographic location. The most recent such policy - the NSF “Engines” program - is designed to enhance the productivity and impact of the investments made within a given regional innovation ecosystem. The impact of such an intervention depends on whether, in its implementation, it induces change in the behavior of individuals and the ways in which knowledge is distributed and translated within that ecosystem. While this logic is straightforward, from it follows an important insight: innovation ecosystem interventions – Engines -- are more likely to succeed when they account for the current state of a given regional ecosystem (latent capacities, current bottlenecks, and economic and institutional constraints) and when they involve extended commitments by multiple stakeholders within that ecosystem. We synthesize the logic, key dependencies, and opportunities for real-time assessment and course correction for these place-based innovation policy interventions.
31541.zh_abstract: 受美国旨在利用区域创新生态系统潜力的主要联邦项目设立的启发，我们评估了基于地点的创新政策干预的前景与挑战。与传统研究资助相比，基于地点的创新政策干预并非针对特定研究项目，而是旨在重塑给定地理区域内研究人员及其他利益相关者之间的互动。最新的此类政策——美国国家科学基金会（NSF）“引擎”项目——旨在提高给定区域创新生态系统内投资的效率和影响力。此类干预的影响取决于其实施过程中是否能够改变个体行为，以及知识在该生态系统内分配和转化的方式。尽管这一逻辑直截了当，但由此得出一个重要见解：创新生态系统干预（即“引擎”）更有可能成功，当它们考虑到给定区域生态系统的当前状态（潜在能力、当前瓶颈以及经济和制度约束），并且涉及该生态系统内多个利益相关者的长期承诺时。我们综合了这些基于地点的创新政策干预的逻辑、关键依赖关系，以及进行实时评估和路径修正的机会。

31540.title: Raising State Minimum Wages, Lowering Community College Enrollment
31540.zh_title: 提高州最低工资，降低社区大学入学率
31540.authors: Diane Whitmore Schanzenbach, Julia A. Turner, Sarah Turner
31540.abstract: While much research attention has focused on the direct labor market effect of minimum wage increases on employment, the impact of changes in the minimum wage on college enrollment may impact educational attainment. Using institutional data on college enrollment and program completion, we find that enrollment falls markedly among students at public two-year institutions in response to increases in the minimum wage. The largest enrollment effects are seen for those students who are enrolled part-time at community colleges. We find little evidence of negative effects on the attainment of certificates or degrees, suggesting that increases in the minimum wage are unlikely to divert students from degree attainment.
31540.zh_abstract: 尽管大量研究关注最低工资上涨对就业的直接劳动力市场效应，但最低工资变化对大学入学率的影响可能影响教育成就。利用关于大学入学和项目完成的机构数据，我们发现，随着最低工资的提高，公立两年制院校的学生入学率显著下降。最大的入学效应体现在社区大学兼职就读的学生身上。我们几乎没有发现对证书或学位获得产生负面影响的证据，这表明最低工资上涨不太可能使学生偏离学位获得。

31538.title: The New Economics of Industrial Policy
31538.authors: Réka Juhász, Nathan J. Lane, Dani Rodrik
31538.abstract: We discuss the considerable literature that has developed in recent years providing rigorous evidence on how industrial policies work. This literature is a significant improvement over the earlier generation of empirical work, which was largely correlational and marred by interpretational problems. On the whole, the recent crop of papers offers a more positive take on industrial policy. We review the standard rationales and critiques of industrial policy and provide a broad overview of new empirical approaches to measurement. We discuss how the recent literature, paying close attention to measurement, causal inference, and economic structure, is offering a nuanced and contextual understanding of the effects of industrial policy. We re-evaluate the East Asian experience with industrial policy in light of recent results. Finally, we conclude by reviewing how industrial policy is being reshaped by a new understanding of governance, a richer set of policy instruments beyond subsidies, and the reality of deindustrialization.
31538.zh_abstract: 我们讨论了近年来发展起来的、提供关于产业政策如何运作的严谨证据的大量文献。这一文献是对早期实证工作的显著改进，早期工作主要基于相关性且存在解释问题。总体而言，近期的一批论文对产业政策持更为积极的态度。我们回顾了产业政策的标准理由和批评，并广泛概述了新的实证测量方法。我们讨论了近期文献如何通过密切关注测量、因果推断和经济结构，提供对产业政策效应的细致且情境化的理解。我们根据近期结果重新评估了东亚的产业政策经验。最后，我们总结回顾了产业政策如何因对治理的新理解、超越补贴的更丰富政策工具组合以及去工业化的现实而被重塑。

31537.title: How do Financial Crises Redistribute Risk?
31537.zh_title: 金融危机如何重新分配风险？
31537.abstract: We examine how financial crises redistribute risk, employing novel empirical methods and micro data from the largest financial crisis of the 20th century – the Great Depression. Using balance-sheet and systemic risk measures at the bank level, we build an econometric model with incidental truncation that jointly considers bank survival, the type of bank closure (consolidations, absorption, and failures), and changes to bank risk. Despite roughly 9,000 bank closures, risk did not leave the financial system; instead, it increased. We show that risk was redistributed to banks that were healthier prior to the financial crisis. A key mechanism driving the redistribution of risk was bank acquisition. Each acquisition increases the balance-sheet and systemic risk of the acquiring bank by 25%. Our findings suggest that financial crises do not quickly purge risk from the system, and that merger policies commonly used to deal with troubled financial institutions during crises have important implications for systemic risk.
31537.zh_abstract: 我们研究了金融危机如何重新分配风险，采用了新颖的实证方法和来自20世纪最大金融危机——大萧条——的微观数据。利用银行层面的资产负债表和系统性风险指标，我们构建了一个包含偶然截断的计量经济学模型，该模型联合考虑了银行生存、银行关闭类型（合并、吸收和破产）以及银行风险的变化。尽管约有9000家银行关闭，但风险并未离开金融体系；相反，风险增加了。我们表明，风险被重新分配给了在金融危机前更为健康的银行。推动风险重新分配的一个关键机制是银行收购。每次收购会使收购银行的资产负债表风险和系统性风险增加25%。我们的研究结果表明，金融危机并不会迅速清除系统中的风险，并且危机期间常用于处理问题金融机构的并购政策对系统性风险具有重要影响。

31536.title: Disadvantaging Rivals: Vertical Integration in the Pharmaceutical Market
31536.zh_title: 削弱竞争对手：医药市场的纵向整合
31536.authors: Charles Gray, Abby E. Alpert, Neeraj Sood
31536.abstract: The pharmaceutical market has experienced a massive wave of vertical integration between pharmacy benefit managers (PBMs) and health insurers in recent years. Using a unique dataset on insurer-PBM contracts, we document increasing vertical integration in Medicare Part D–vertically integrated insurers' market share increased from about 30% to 80% between 2010 and 2018. Next, we evaluate a large insurer-PBM merger in 2015 to assess the trade-offs of vertical integration–harms to competition due to input and customer foreclosure on the one hand and improved efficiency on the other. We find premium increases after the merger for insurers who bought PBM services from rivals, which is consistent with vertically integrated PBMs raising costs through input foreclosure.
31536.zh_abstract: 近年来，医药市场经历了药品福利管理公司与健康保险公司之间大规模的纵向整合浪潮。利用关于保险公司与药品福利管理公司合同的独特数据集，我们记录了医疗保险D部分中纵向整合的加剧——纵向整合保险公司的市场份额从2010年的约30%增加到2018年的80%。接下来，我们评估了2015年一家大型保险公司与药品福利管理公司的合并，以评估纵向整合的权衡——一方面是由于投入和客户封锁对竞争造成的损害，另一方面是效率的提高。我们发现，合并后，从竞争对手那里购买药品福利管理服务的保险公司的保费有所上涨，这与纵向整合的药品福利管理公司通过投入封锁提高成本是一致的。

31535.title: Youth Labor Force Participation, Education, and Human Capital in Asia, by Gender, 1990-2019
31535.zh_title: 1990-2019年亚洲青年劳动力参与率、教育和人力资本（按性别分列）
31535.abstract: Of great importance to the future World economy is the future labor force of Asia, as Asia is by far the most populous region in the World. Expected future levels of education, very young and youth population, youth employment and unemployment, dependency rates, human capital per capita, and the sources of growth in the potential future labor force are described in this paper with an emphasis on differences by gender and differences across regions. Some comparisons between China and India and between Asia and selected other regions and aggregates are also included. Gini human capital coefficients are constructed for regions in Asia and the selected other regions and aggregates are constructed to reinforce the importance of recognizing gender in any analysis.
31535.zh_abstract: 对未来世界经济至关重要的是亚洲未来的劳动力，因为亚洲是世界上人口最多的地区。本文描述了预期的未来教育水平、非常年轻和青年人口、青年就业和失业、抚养比、人均人力资本以及潜在未来劳动力的增长来源，重点强调了性别差异和地区差异。文中还包括了中国与印度之间、亚洲与其他选定地区和总量之间的一些比较。为亚洲地区以及选定的其他地区和总量构建了人力资本基尼系数，以强化在任何分析中认识性别重要性的意义。
31535.meta: Programs：DEV, LS；JEL：I21, J16, J21, J24, O53

31534.title: Fear or Knowledge The Impact of Graphic Cigarette Warnings on Tobacco Product Choices
31534.zh_title: 恐惧还是知识？图形香烟警告对烟草产品选择的影响
31534.authors: Donald S. Kenkel, Alan D. Mathios, Grace N. Phillips, Revathy Suryanarayana, Hua Wang, Sen Zeng
31534.abstract: Requiring graphic warning labels (GWLs) on cigarette packaging has become a highly contentious unresolved legal battle. The constitutionality depends, in part, on the likely impact of GWLs on smoking decisions, and whether they generate knowledge as opposed to emotional reactions against smoking. Using an online discrete choice stated preference experiment we compare tobacco choices (cigarettes, e-cigarettes, quitting) for those presented with a GWL versus the currently existing label. We find the fraction of individuals choosing cigarettes to be lower and quitting higher for the GWL group. Our findings reveal that the differences between groups were primarily driven by the evocation of fear and disgust rather than an improvement in health knowledge related to the GWL. The discrete choice experiment also provides new evidence on how cigarette prices, e-cigarette prices, and policy-manipulable e-cigarette attributes such as e-cigarette warning labels, and flavor availability influence tobacco product choices.
31534.zh_abstract: 要求在香烟包装上使用图形警告标签已成为一场高度争议且尚未解决的法律斗争。其合宪性部分取决于图形警告标签对吸烟决策的可能影响，以及它们是否产生知识而非针对吸烟的情绪反应。通过一项在线离散选择陈述偏好实验，我们比较了呈现图形警告标签与当前现有标签的群体在烟草选择（香烟、电子烟、戒烟）上的差异。我们发现，图形警告标签组中选择香烟的个体比例较低，而选择戒烟的比例较高。我们的研究结果表明，两组之间的差异主要是由引发恐惧和厌恶情绪驱动的，而非与图形警告标签相关的健康知识的改善。离散选择实验还提供了关于香烟价格、电子烟价格以及政策可操纵的电子烟属性（如电子烟警告标签和口味可用性）如何影响烟草产品选择的新证据。

31533.title: Temperature, Adaptation, and Local Industry Concentration
31533.zh_title: 温度、适应性与地方产业集中度
31533.authors: Jacopo Ponticelli, Qiping Xu, Stefan Zeume
31533.abstract: We use plant-level data from the U.S. Census of Manufacturers to study the short- and long-run effects of temperature on manufacturing activity. We find that high-temperature shocks significantly increase energy costs and lower productivity for small plants, while large plants are mostly unaffected. Commuting zones with higher increases in average temperatures between the 1980s and the 2010s experience a decline in the number of small plants, reallocation of labor from small to large plants, and higher local labor market concentration. Differences in costs per unit of energy, managerial skills, and access to finance contribute to explaining our results.
31533.zh_abstract: 我们利用美国制造业普查的企业层面数据，研究了温度对制造业活动的短期和长期影响。我们发现，高温冲击显著增加了小型企业的能源成本并降低了其生产率，而大型企业基本不受影响。在1980年代至2010年代期间，平均气温上升幅度较大的通勤区经历了小型企业数量下降、劳动力从小型企业向大型企业重新配置以及地方劳动力市场集中度提高。单位能源成本、管理技能和融资渠道的差异有助于解释我们的结果。
31533.meta: Programs：CF, DAE, EFG, PR；JEL：G3, L11, O14, Q54

31532.title: Trends in the Retirement Preparedness of Black and Hispanic Households in the US
31532.zh_title: 美国黑人和西班牙裔家庭退休准备情况的趋势
31532.abstract: Retirement income security refers to the ability of households to provide an adequate stream of income during the period of their retirement from the labor force. Expected retirement income is based of four components: (i) standard non-pension wealth holdings, (ii) defined contribution (DC) pension holdings, (iii) actual or expected defined benefit (DB) pension entitlements, and (iv) actual or expected Social Security benefits. The first two components are converted into an annuity. All the data (except rates of return) for these calculations are available from the Survey of Consumer Finances. Results indicate that both Black and Hispanic households made remarkable progress in terms of mean and median retirement income, poverty reduction, and replacement rates from 1989 to 2007 in both absolute terms and relative to whites. However, for Black households, this was followed by a reversal of fortune from 2007 to 2019, with expected median retirement income declining, the projected poverty rate rising, and the projected replacement rate falling, though expected mean retirement income does rise. Hispanics also experienced a setback in mean retirement income but continued progress in replacement rates and reducing poverty from 2007 to 2019.
31532.zh_abstract: 退休收入安全是指家庭在退出劳动力市场后的退休期间提供充足收入流的能力。预期退休收入基于四个组成部分：（i）标准非养老金财富持有量，（ii）固定缴费型养老金持有量，（iii）实际或预期的固定收益型养老金权益，以及（iv）实际或预期的社会保障福利。前两个组成部分被转换为年金。这些计算所需的所有数据（除回报率外）均来自消费者金融调查。结果表明，从1989年到2007年，无论是绝对值还是相对于白人，黑人和西班牙裔家庭在平均和中位退休收入、减贫以及替代率方面都取得了显著进步。然而，对于黑人家庭而言，从2007年到2019年，情况发生了逆转：预期中位退休收入下降，预计贫困率上升，预计替代率下降，尽管预期平均退休收入确实有所上升。西班牙裔家庭在平均退休收入方面也遭遇了挫折，但从2007年到2019年，他们在替代率和减贫方面继续取得进展。

31531.title: The Impact of Violence on the Dynamics of Migration: Evidence from the Mexican Revolution
31531.zh_title: 暴力对移民动态的影响：来自墨西哥革命的证据
31531.authors: David Escamilla-Guerrero, Edward Kosack, Zachary Ward
31531.abstract: Forced displacement from conflict has risen sharply in recent decades, yet little is known about how violence impacts migration dynamics in the short run or over a longer horizon. Using novel high-frequency data during the Mexican Revolution (1910-1917), one of history’s deadliest conflicts, we find that localized violence caused a sharp but temporary 60 percent spike in migration to the US, lasting only seven months before reverting to pre-conflict levels. We do not find evidence of increased migration after the Revolution, suggesting that refugee networks did not spur significant chain migration, even during an era of relatively open borders.
31531.zh_abstract: 近几十年来，冲突导致的被迫流离失所急剧增加，但关于暴力如何在短期内或更长时间内影响移民动态，人们知之甚少。利用墨西哥革命（1910-1917年）——历史上最致命的冲突之一——期间新颖的高频数据，我们发现局部暴力导致移民到美国的人数急剧但暂时地飙升了60%，这种飙升仅持续了七个月，然后恢复到冲突前的水平。我们没有发现革命后移民增加的证据，这表明难民网络并未引发显著的连锁移民，即使在边界相对开放的时代也是如此。

31530.title: Converting Brown Offices to Green Apartments
31530.zh_title: 将棕色办公楼改造成绿色公寓
31530.authors: Arpit Gupta, Candy Martinez, Stijn Van Nieuwerburgh
31530.abstract: The conversion of brown office buildings to green apartments can contribute towards a solution to three pressing issues: oversupply of office in a hybrid-and-remote-work world, shortage of housing, and excessive greenhouse gas emissions. We propose a set of criteria to identify commercial office properties that are are physically suitable for conversion, yielding about 11% of all office buildings across the U.S. We present a pro-forma real estate model that identifies parameters under which these conversions are financially viable. We highlight several policy levers available to federal, state, and local governments that could accelerate the conversion, and that may be necessary should policymakers desire the creation of affordable housing. We highlight the role that the Inflation Reduction Act could play.
31530.zh_abstract: 将棕色办公楼改造成绿色公寓有助于解决三个紧迫问题：混合办公和远程办公世界中的办公楼供应过剩、住房短缺以及过度的温室气体排放。我们提出了一套标准来识别物理上适合改造的商业办公物业，这涵盖了美国约11%的办公楼。我们提出了一个形式上的房地产模型，用于确定这些改造在财务上可行的参数。我们强调了联邦、州和地方政府可用的几个政策杠杆，这些杠杆可以加速改造，并且如果政策制定者希望创建经济适用房，这些杠杆可能是必要的。我们强调了《通胀削减法案》可能发挥的作用。
31530.meta: Programs：AG, AP, EEE, EFG, PE；JEL：G1, Q51, Q54, Q58, R21, R23, R32, R38

31529.title: Using Lotteries to Attract Deposits
31529.authors: Paul Gertler, Sean Higgins, Aisling Scott, Enrique Seira
31529.abstract: Despite the importance of deposit financing for lending, banks in developing countries struggle to attract deposits. In a randomized experiment across 110 bank branches throughout Mexico, a lottery incentive based on net monthly deposits caused a 40% increase in the number of accounts opened and a 21% increase in the number of deposits during the lottery months. Nearly all new accounts (96%) were opened by households previously unbanked at any bank. The temporary two-month incentive had a persistent 2-3 year impact on the flow of deposits and stock of savings, and increased the present value of branch profits by 6%.
31529.zh_abstract: 尽管存款融资对贷款至关重要，但发展中国家的银行在吸引存款方面面临困难。在墨西哥110家银行分行进行的一项随机实验中，基于月度净存款的抽奖激励措施使抽奖月份的开户数量增加了40%，存款笔数增加了21%。几乎所有新账户（96%）都是由此前在任何银行均无账户的家庭开设的。这一为期两个月的临时激励措施对存款流量和储蓄存量产生了持续2至3年的影响，并使分行利润的现值增加了6%。

31528.title: Sticky Wages on the Layoff Margin
31528.authors: Steven J. Davis, Pawel M. Krolikowski
31528.abstract: We design and field an innovative survey of unemployment insurance (UI) recipients that yields new insights about wage stickiness on the layoff margin. Most UI recipients express a willingness to accept wage cuts of 5-10 percent to save their jobs, and one third would accept a 25 percent pay cut. Yet worker-employer discussions about cuts in pay, benefits or hours in lieu of layoffs are exceedingly rare. When asked why employers don’t propose job-saving pay cuts, four-in-ten UI recipients don’t know. Sixteen percent say cuts would undermine morale or lead the best workers to quit, and 39 percent don’t think wage cuts would save their jobs. For lost union jobs, 45 percent say contracts prevent wage cuts. Among those on permanent layoff who reject our hypothetical pay cuts, half say they have better outside options, and 38 percent regard the proposed pay cut as insulting. At least one-tenth of the layoffs in our sample violate the condition for bilaterally efficient separations in leading theories of job separations, frictional unemployment, and job ladders. We draw on our findings and other evidence to assess theories of wage stickiness and its role in layoffs.
31528.zh_abstract: 我们设计并实施了一项针对失业保险领取者的创新调查，该调查揭示了关于裁员边缘工资粘性的新见解。大多数失业保险领取者表示愿意接受5%至10%的工资削减以保住工作，三分之一的人愿意接受25%的减薪。然而，工人与雇主之间关于以减薪、削减福利或减少工时来替代裁员的讨论极为罕见。当被问及雇主为何不提出保岗减薪方案时，40%的失业保险领取者表示不知道。16%的人认为减薪会打击士气或导致最优秀的员工离职，39%的人认为减薪无法保住他们的工作。对于失去的工会职位，45%的人表示合同禁止减薪。在那些拒绝我们假设性减薪的永久性裁员者中，一半人表示他们有更好的外部选择，38%的人认为提议的减薪具有侮辱性。在我们样本中，至少十分之一的裁员违反了关于工作分离、摩擦性失业和职业阶梯的主要理论中双边有效分离的条件。我们利用我们的发现及其他证据来评估关于工资粘性及其在裁员中作用的理论。
31528.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, ME, PE；JEL：E24, J31, J63, J65

31527.title: The Disparate Impacts of College Admissions Policies on Asian American Applicants
31527.zh_title: 大学招生政策对亚裔美国申请人的差异化影响
31527.authors: Joshua Grossman, Sabina Tomkins, Lindsay C. Page, Sharad Goel
31527.abstract: There is debate over whether Asian American students are admitted to selective colleges and universities at lower rates than white students with similar academic qualifications. However, there have been few empirical investigations of this issue, in large part due to a dearth of data. Here we present the results from analyzing 685,709 applications from Asian American and white students to a subset of selective U.S. institutions over five application cycles, beginning with the 2015–2016 cycle. The dataset does not include admissions decisions, and so we construct a proxy based in part on enrollment choices. Based on this proxy, we estimate the odds that Asian American applicants were admitted to at least one of the schools we consider were 28% lower than the odds for white students with similar test scores, grade-point averages, and extracurricular activities. The gap was particularly pronounced for students of South Asian descent (49% lower odds). We trace this pattern in part to two factors. First, many selective colleges openly give preference to the children of alumni, and we find that white applicants were substantially more likely to have such legacy status than Asian applicants, especially South Asian applicants. Second, after adjusting for observed student characteristics, the institutions we consider appear less likely to admit students from geographic regions with relatively high shares of applicants who are Asian. We hope these results inform ongoing discussions on the equity of college admissions policies.
31527.zh_abstract: 关于亚裔美国学生是否以低于学业资格相当的白人学生的比率被选择性大学录取，存在争议。然而，对此问题的实证研究很少，主要原因是数据匮乏。在此，我们展示了分析结果，该分析涵盖了从2015-2016申请周期开始的五个申请周期内，亚裔美国学生和白人学生向美国部分选择性院校提交的685,709份申请。该数据集不包括录取决定，因此我们部分基于入学选择构建了一个代理变量。基于该代理变量，我们估计，与具有相似考试成绩、平均绩点和课外活动的白人学生相比，亚裔美国申请人被我们考虑的至少一所学校录取的几率低28%。对于南亚裔学生，这一差距尤为显著（几率低49%）。我们将这种模式部分归因于两个因素。首先，许多选择性大学公开优先录取校友子女，我们发现白人申请人比亚裔申请人（尤其是南亚裔申请人）更有可能拥有这种传承身份。其次，在根据观察到的学生特征进行调整后，我们考虑的院校似乎不太可能录取来自亚裔申请人比例相对较高地理区域的学生。我们希望这些结果能为关于大学招生政策公平性的持续讨论提供信息。

31526.title: The Shadow Price of Capital: Accounting for Capital Displacement in Cost Benefit Analysis
31526.zh_title: 资本的影子价格：成本效益分析中资本置换的核算
31526.authors: Richard G. Newell, William A. Pizer, Brian C. Prest
31526.abstract: Government analysts have long used discount rates based on investment rates of return to approximate the effect of capital displacement. However, we show how this approach is not well grounded in economic theory and produces highly biased results, particularly in the context of decisions involving long-lived impacts such as climate change. We demonstrate how analysts can use the conceptually correct shadow price of capital (SPC) approach in a straightforward manner to account for concerns about capital displacement in federal regulatory analysis. We derive a formula for the SPC as a function of four key parameters and propose a central SPC value of 1.1, with a reasonable range of 1.1 to 1.2. We then illustrate how the SPC approach could be easily implemented in practice using the example of the 2015 Clean Power Plan Regulatory Impact Analysis, showing that estimated net benefits are far less sensitive to capital displacement concerns under the analytically correct SPC approach as compared to the inappropriate approach of using a 7 percent investment rate or return. Our work is particularly important given the ongoing efforts to revise federal guidance for benefit-cost analysis and discounting.
31526.zh_abstract: 政府分析人员长期以来一直使用基于投资回报率的贴现率来近似资本置换的影响。然而，我们展示了这种方法缺乏经济理论基础，并会产生高度偏差的结果，尤其是在涉及气候变化等长期影响的决策中。我们展示了分析人员如何以直接的方式使用概念上正确的资本影子价格方法来核算联邦监管分析中关于资本置换的担忧。我们推导出资本影子价格作为四个关键参数的函数公式，并提出一个中心资本影子价格值为1.1，合理范围为1.1至1.2。然后，我们以2015年清洁电力计划监管影响分析为例，说明了资本影子价格方法在实践中如何易于实施，表明在分析正确的资本影子价格方法下，估计的净收益对资本置换担忧的敏感度远低于使用7%投资回报率的不当方法。鉴于目前正在努力修订联邦关于成本效益分析和贴现的指导方针，我们的工作尤为重要。

31525.title: The Impact of Vaccines and Behavior on U.S. Cumulative Deaths from COVID-19
31525.zh_title: 疫苗与行为对美国COVID-19累计死亡人数的影响
31525.abstract: The CDC reports that 1.13 million Americans have died of COVID-19 through June of 2023. I use a model of the impact over the past three years of vaccines and private and public behavior to mitigate disease transmission during the COVID-19 pandemic in the United States to address two questions. First, holding the strength of the response of behavior to the level of daily deaths from COVID-19 fixed, what was the impact of vaccines on cumulative mortality from COVID-19 up through June 2023? And second, holding the pace of deployment of vaccinations fixed, what would have been the impact of stricter or looser behavioral responses to COVID-19 deaths on cumulative mortality from COVID-19 over this same time period? In answering the first question, I find that vaccines saved 748,600 lives through June 2023. That is, without vaccines, cumulative mortality from COVID-19 would have been closer to 1.91 million over this time period. In answering the second question, I find that behavioral efforts to slow the transmission of the virus before vaccines became widely administered were critical to this positive impact of vaccines on cumulative mortality. For example, with a complete relaxation of these mitigation efforts, vaccines would have come too late to have saved a significant number of lives. Earlier deployment of vaccines would have saved many lives. I find that marginal changes in the strength of the behavioral response to COVID-19 deaths within the range of those responses estimated with the model have a significantly impact on cumulative COVID-19 mortality over this time period.
31525.zh_abstract: 美国疾病控制与预防中心报告称，截至2023年6月，已有113万美国人死于COVID-19。我使用一个模型来研究过去三年中，疫苗以及私人和公共行为在缓解美国COVID-19大流行期间疾病传播方面的影响，以解决两个问题。首先，在行为对每日COVID-19死亡人数的反应强度保持不变的情况下，截至2023年6月，疫苗对COVID-19累计死亡率的影响是什么？其次，在疫苗接种部署速度保持不变的情况下，对COVID-19死亡人数采取更严格或更宽松的行为反应，在同一时期会对累计死亡率产生什么影响？在回答第一个问题时，我发现疫苗截至2023年6月挽救了748,600人的生命。也就是说，如果没有疫苗，同期COVID-19的累计死亡率将接近191万。在回答第二个问题时，我发现，在疫苗广泛接种之前，为减缓病毒传播所做的行为努力对于疫苗对累计死亡率的这种积极影响至关重要。例如，如果完全放松这些缓解措施，疫苗将来得太晚，无法挽救大量生命。更早地部署疫苗本可以挽救许多生命。我发现，在模型估计的行为反应强度范围内，对COVID-19死亡人数的行为反应强度的边际变化，对这一时期内的累计COVID-19死亡率有显著影响。

31524.title: Risk Preferences Over Health: Empirical Estimates and Implications for Healthcare Decision-Making
31524.zh_title: 健康风险偏好：实证估计及其对医疗决策的启示
31524.authors: Karen Mulligan, Drishti Baid, Jason N. Doctor, Charles E. Phelps, Darius N. Lakdawalla
31524.abstract: Recent research has documented a link between consumer risk preferences over health and the willingness to pay (WTP) for medical technologies. However, the absence of empirical health risk preference estimates so far limits the implementation of this generalized risk-adjusted cost-effectiveness (GRACE) theory, which addresses several limitations of traditional cost-effectiveness analysis (CEA). To address this gap, we elicit from a nationally representative U.S. sample individual risk preference parameters over health-related quality of life (HRQoL) that shed light on health risk attitudes and enable GRACE valuation of medical technology. We find individuals exhibit risk-seeking preferences at low levels of health, switch to risk-averse preferences at health equal to 0.485 (measured on a zero to one scale), and become most risk-averse when their health is perfect (coefficient of relative risk aversion = 4.36). The risk preference estimates imply an empirical premium for disease severity: each unit of health is worth three times more to patients with serious health conditions (health equals 0.5) than those who are perfectly healthy. They also imply that traditional CEA overvalues treatments for the mildest diseases by more than a factor of two. Use of traditional CEA both overstimulates mild disease treatment innovation and underprovides severe disease treatment innovation.
31524.zh_abstract: 近期研究记录了消费者对健康的风险偏好与对医疗技术的支付意愿之间的联系。然而，迄今为止缺乏实证的健康风险偏好估计，限制了这种广义风险调整成本效益理论的应用，该理论解决了传统成本效益分析的若干局限性。为弥补这一空白，我们从具有全国代表性的美国样本中，引出了个体对健康相关生活质量的风险偏好参数，这些参数揭示了健康风险态度，并使得对医疗技术进行广义风险调整成本效益评估成为可能。我们发现，个体在低健康水平时表现出风险寻求偏好，在健康水平等于0.485（以0到1的尺度衡量）时转为风险厌恶偏好，并在健康完美时风险厌恶程度最高（相对风险厌恶系数为4.36）。这些风险偏好估计意味着疾病严重程度的经验溢价：对于患有严重健康状况（健康水平等于0.5）的患者，每单位健康的价值是健康完美者的三倍。它们还意味着，传统成本效益分析对最轻微疾病治疗的价值高估了两倍多。使用传统成本效益分析既过度刺激了轻微疾病治疗的创新，又对严重疾病治疗的创新供给不足。

31523.title: Estimating the Impact of the Age of Criminal Majority: Decomposing Multiple Treatments in a Regression Discontinuity Framework
31523.zh_title: 估算刑事责任年龄的影响：在断点回归框架中分解多重处理
31523.authors: Michael G. Mueller-Smith, Benjamin Pyle, Caroline Walker
31523.abstract: This paper studies the impact of adult prosecution on recidivism and employment trajectories for adolescent, first-time felony defendants. We use extensive linked Criminal Justice Admin- istrative Record System and socio-economic data from Wayne County, Michigan (Detroit). Using the discrete age of majority rule and a regression discontinuity design, we find that adult prosecution reduces future criminal charges over 5 years by 0.48 felony cases (↓ 20%) while also worsening labor market outcomes: 0.76 fewer employers (↓ 19%) and $\$674$ fewer earnings (↓ 21%) per year. We develop a novel econometric framework that combines standard regression discontinuity methods with predictive machine learning models to identify mechanism-specific treatment effects that underpin the overall impact of adult prosecution. We leverage these estimates to consider four policy counterfactuals: (1) raising the age of majority, (2) increasing adult dismissals to match the juvenile disposition rates, (3) eliminating adult incarceration, and (4) expanding juvenile record sealing opportunities to teenage adult defendants. All four scenarios generate positive returns for government budgets. When accounting for impacts to defendants as well as victim costs borne by society stemming from increases in recidivism, we find positive social returns for juvenile record sealing expansions and dismissing marginal adult charges; raising the age of majority breaks even. Eliminating prison for first-time adult felony defendants, however, increases net social costs. Policymakers may still find this attractive if they are willing to value beneficiaries (taxpayers and defendants) slightly higher (124%) than potential victims.
31523.zh_abstract: 本文研究了成人起诉对青少年初犯重罪被告人的累犯和就业轨迹的影响。我们使用了来自密歇根州韦恩县（底特律）的广泛关联的刑事司法行政记录系统和社会经济数据。利用离散的成年年龄规则和断点回归设计，我们发现成人起诉使未来5年内的刑事指控减少了0.48起重罪案件（下降20%），同时恶化了劳动力市场结果：每年雇主数量减少0.76个（下降19%），收入减少674美元（下降21%）。我们开发了一个新颖的计量经济学框架，将标准断点回归方法与预测性机器学习模型相结合，以识别构成成人起诉总体影响基础的机制特定处理效应。我们利用这些估计来考虑四种政策反事实情景：（1）提高成年年龄，（2）增加成人案件驳回率以匹配青少年处置率，（3）消除成人监禁，以及（4）将青少年记录封存机会扩大到青少年成年被告人。所有四种情景都为政府预算带来了正回报。当考虑到对被告人的影响以及因累犯增加而由社会承担的受害者成本时，我们发现扩大青少年记录封存和驳回边缘成人指控能带来正社会回报；提高成年年龄则收支平衡。然而，消除初犯成人重罪被告人的监禁会增加社会净成本。如果政策制定者愿意对受益者（纳税人和被告人）的估值略高于潜在受害者（124%），他们可能仍会觉得这一方案有吸引力。
31523.meta: Programs：CH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：C36, C45, J24, K14, K42

31522.title: Temperature and Maltreatment of Young Children
31522.authors: Mary F. Evans, Ludovica Gazze, Jessamyn Schaller
31522.abstract: We estimate the impacts of temperature on alleged and substantiated child maltreatment among young children using administrative data from state child protective services agencies. Leveraging short-term weather variation, we find increases in the number of young children involved in cases of alleged and substantiated maltreatment during hot periods. Additional analysis identifies neglect as the temperature-sensitive maltreatment type, and we find some evidence that adaptation via air conditioning mitigates this relationship. Given that climate change will increase exposure to extreme temperatures, our findings speak to additional costs of climate change among the most vulnerable.
31522.zh_abstract: 我们利用州儿童保护服务机构的行政数据，估计了温度对幼儿涉嫌和证实的虐待案件的影响。利用短期天气变化，我们发现炎热时期涉及涉嫌和证实虐待案件的幼儿数量有所增加。进一步分析确定忽视是对温度敏感的虐待类型，并且我们发现一些证据表明，通过空调进行适应可以缓解这种关系。鉴于气候变化将增加极端温度的暴露，我们的研究结果揭示了气候变化在最脆弱群体中带来的额外成本。

31521.title: Research and/or Development? Financial Frictions and Innovation Investment
31521.zh_title: 研究与/或开发？金融摩擦与创新投资
31521.abstract: Abstract U.S. firms have reduced their investment in scientific research (“R”) compared to product development (“D”), raising questions about the returns to each type of investment, and about the reasons for this shift. We use Census data that disaggregates “R” from “D” to study how US firms adjust their innovation investments in response to an external increase in funding cost. Companies with greater demand for refinancing during the 2008 financial crisis made larger cuts to R&D investment. This reduction in R&D is achieved almost entirely by reducing investments in basic and applied research. Development remains essentially unchanged. Although patenting is more strongly correlated with development than research investments, the impact of the crisis appears in citation-weighted patent output after 3 to 5 years. Finally, we show that if other firms patenting similar technologies are exposed to the crisis, then a focal firm's Development investment declines. We consider several mechanisms that could explain these results, and without ruling out every alternative, conclude that the overall pattern is consistent with an important role for technological competition in R&D financing decisions.
31521.zh_abstract: 美国企业已减少对科学研究（“R”）的投资，相较于产品开发（“D”），这引发了对各类投资回报率以及这一转变原因的疑问。我们利用将“R”与“D”分开统计的人口普查数据，研究美国企业如何调整其创新投资以应对外部融资成本上升。在2008年金融危机期间，再融资需求较大的企业更大幅度地削减了研发投资。这种研发削减几乎完全是通过减少基础研究和应用研究投资实现的，而开发投资基本保持不变。尽管专利活动与开发投资的相关性比与研究投资更强，但危机的影响在3至5年后的引用加权专利产出中显现。最后，我们表明，如果其他申请类似技术专利的企业也受到危机冲击，那么焦点企业的开发投资会下降。我们考虑了可能解释这些结果的几种机制，并在不排除所有替代解释的情况下得出结论：整体模式与技术创新竞争在研发融资决策中发挥重要作用是一致的。

31520.title: US Monetary Policy and the Return to Price Stability
31520.zh_title: 美国货币政策与回归价格稳定
31520.abstract: This paper assesses the proximate causes of the post pandemic surge in US inflation, the Federal Reserve's real time reaction to and interpretation of incoming data in 2021, and the pivot to raising rates and shrinking the balance sheet that commenced in 2022 and continues in 2023. Particular attention is devoted to the role, if any, that Fed's August 2020 revisions to its monetary policy framework may have played in delaying lift - off relative to counterfactuals informed by simple policy rules, including a framework - consistent "shortfalls" policy rule featured in its semi - annual Monetary Policy Reports.
31520.zh_abstract: 本文评估了疫情后美国通胀飙升的直接原因、美联储在2021年对实时数据的反应和解读，以及始于2022年并持续至2023年的加息和缩表政策转向。特别关注美联储2020年8月对其货币政策框架的修订是否以及在多大程度上导致了加息启动延迟，相较于由简单政策规则（包括其半年度货币政策报告中一项符合框架的“短缺”政策规则）所推导的反事实情景。

31519.title: Currency Areas, Labor Markets, and Regional Cyclical Sensitivity
31519.zh_title: 货币区、劳动力市场与区域周期敏感性
31519.authors: Katheryn Russ, Jay C. Shambaugh, Sanjay R. Singh
31519.abstract: In his papers during the lead up to the birth of the European Monetary Union, Obstfeld considered whether the countries forming the EMU were sufficiently similar to survive a single monetary policy—and more importantly, whether they had the capacity to adjust to asymmetric shocks given a single monetary and exchange rate policy. The convention at the time was to take the United States as the baseline for a smoothly functioning currency union. We document the evolution of the literature on regional labor market adjustment within the United States, expanding on stylized facts illustrating how stratification in local labor market outcomes appears far more persistent today than 30 years ago in the context of what Obstfeld and Peri (1998) call non-adjustment in unemployment rates. We then extend the currency union literature by adding an additional consideration: differences in regional cyclical sensitivity. Using measures of cyclicality and Obstfeld-Peri-type non-adjustment, we explore the characteristics of places that can get left behind when local labor markets respond differently to national shocks and discuss implications for policy.
31519.zh_abstract: 在欧洲货币联盟诞生前夕的论文中，Obstfeld探讨了组成EMU的国家是否足够相似以承受单一货币政策——更重要的是，在单一货币和汇率政策下，它们是否有能力调整以应对不对称冲击。当时的惯例是将美国视为运作良好的货币联盟的基准。我们记录了美国区域劳动力市场调整文献的演变，扩展了典型事实，说明在Obstfeld和Peri（1998）所称的失业率非调整背景下，如今地方劳动力市场结果的分层现象比30年前更为持久。然后，我们通过增加一个额外考量——区域周期敏感性的差异——来扩展货币联盟文献。利用周期性指标和Obstfeld-Peri式的非调整指标，我们探讨了当地方劳动力市场对国家冲击反应不同时可能被落下的地区的特征，并讨论了对政策的启示。

31570.title: The Search for Good Jobs: Evidence from a Six-year Field Experiment in Uganda
31570.zh_title: 寻找好工作：来自乌干达一项六年实地实验的证据
31570.authors: Oriana Bandiera, Vittorio Bassi, Robin Burgess, Imran Rasul, Munshi Sulaiman, Anna Vitali
31570.abstract: There are 420 million young people in Africa today. Understanding how youth search for jobs and what affects their ability to find good jobs is of paramount importance. We do so using a field experiment tracking young job seekers for six years in Uganda's main cities. We examine how two standard labor market interventions impact their search for good jobs: vocational training, vocational training combined with matching youth to firms, and matching only. Training is offered in sectors with high quality firms. The matching intervention assigns workers for interviews with such firms. At baseline, unskilled youth are optimistic about their job prospects, especially over the job offer arrival rate from high quality firms. Those offered vocational training become even more optimistic, search more intensively and direct their search towards high quality firms. However, youth additionally offered matching become discouraged because call back rates from firm owners are far lower than their prior. As a result, they search less intensively and direct their search towards lower quality firms. These divergent expectations and search behaviors have persistent impacts: vocational trainees without match offers achieve greater labor market success, largely because they end up employed at higher quality firms than youth additionally offered matching. Our analysis highlights the foundational but separate roles of skills and expectations in job search, how interventions cause youth to become optimistic or discouraged, and how this matters for long run sorting and individual labor market outcomes.
31570.zh_abstract: 如今非洲有4.2亿年轻人。了解年轻人如何寻找工作以及什么因素影响他们找到好工作的能力至关重要。我们通过一项在乌干达主要城市跟踪年轻求职者六年的实地实验来做到这一点。我们考察了两种标准的劳动力市场干预措施如何影响他们对好工作的寻找：职业培训、职业培训结合将青年与公司匹配，以及仅匹配。培训在拥有高质量公司的行业提供。匹配干预措施为求职者安排与这些公司的面试。在基线时，低技能青年对自己的就业前景持乐观态度，尤其是对来自高质量公司的工作机会到达率。那些获得职业培训的人变得更加乐观，更密集地搜索，并将搜索方向转向高质量公司。然而，额外获得匹配机会的青年变得沮丧，因为公司老板的回电率远低于他们的先验预期。结果，他们搜索的密集度降低，并将搜索方向转向低质量公司。这些不同的预期和搜索行为产生了持久的影响：没有匹配机会的职业培训学员在劳动力市场上取得了更大的成功，这主要是因为与额外获得匹配机会的青年相比，他们最终受雇于更高质量的公司。我们的分析强调了技能和预期在求职中的基础性但独立的作用，干预措施如何使青年变得乐观或沮丧，以及这对长期分类和个人劳动力市场结果的重要性。

31569.title: Productivity Variation and Input Misallocation: Evidence from Hospitals
31569.zh_title: 生产率差异与投入错配：来自医院的证据
31569.authors: Amitabh Chandra, Carrie H. Colla, Jonathan S. Skinner
31569.abstract: There are widespread differences in total factor productivity across producers in the U.S. and around the world. To help explain these variations, we devise a general test for misallocation in input choices – the underuse of effective inputs and overuse of ineffective ones. Misallocation implies that conditional on total input use, the return to using a particular input is not zero (a positive return implies underuse, and a negative return implies overuse). We measure misallocation across hospitals, where inputs and outputs are better measured than in other industries. Applying our test to a sample of 1.6 million Medicare beneficiaries with heart attacks (of which 436 thousand were admitted by ambulance), we reject the hypothesis of productive efficiency; moving a patient from a 10th percentile to a 90th percentile hospital with respect to misallocation, holding spending constant, is predicted to increase survival by 3.1 percentage points. With misallocation accounting for as much as 25 percent of the variation in hospital productivity, our results suggest that how the money is spent, rather than how much money is spent, is central to understanding productivity differences both in health care, and in the rest of the economy.
31569.zh_abstract: 在美国及全球范围内，各生产者的全要素生产率存在广泛差异。为解释这些差异，我们设计了一种针对投入选择错配的通用检验方法——即有效投入使用不足与无效投入过度使用。错配意味着，在总投入使用量给定的条件下，使用特定投入的回报不为零（正回报表示使用不足，负回报表示过度使用）。我们衡量了医院之间的错配程度，因为与其他行业相比，医院的投入和产出更容易衡量。我们将该检验应用于一个包含160万因心脏病发作而接受治疗的医疗保险受益人的样本（其中43.6万人由救护车送院），结果拒绝了生产效率假设；在保持支出不变的情况下，将患者从错配程度处于第10百分位的医院转移到第90百分位的医院，预计可使存活率提高3.1个百分点。由于错配可解释医院生产率差异的25%，我们的结果表明，资金如何被使用，而非资金花费的多少，是理解医疗保健领域以及经济其他部门生产率差异的关键。

31567.title: Drinking Water Contaminant Concentrations and Birth Outcomes
31567.zh_title: 饮用水污染物浓度与出生结局
31567.abstract: Previous research in the US has found negative health effects of contamination when it triggers regulatory violations. An important question is whether levels of contamination that do not trigger a health-based violation impact health. We study the impact of drinking water contamination in community water systems on birth outcomes using drinking water sampling results data in Pennsylvania. We create an overall water quality index and an index specific to reproductive health. We focus on the effects of water contamination for births not exposed to regulatory violations. Our most rigorous specification employs mother fixed effects and finds changing from the 10th to the 90th percentile of water contamination (among births not exposed to regulatory violations) increases low birth weight by 12% and preterm birth by 17%.
31567.zh_abstract: 先前在美国的研究发现，当污染触发监管违规时，会对健康产生负面影响。一个重要的问题是，未触发基于健康的违规标准的污染水平是否会影响健康。我们利用宾夕法尼亚州的饮用水采样结果数据，研究了社区供水系统中饮用水污染对出生结局的影响。我们创建了一个总体水质指数和一个专门针对生殖健康的指数。我们重点关注未暴露于监管违规的出生人口中水污染的影响。我们最严格的设定采用了母亲固定效应，发现（在未暴露于监管违规的出生人口中）水污染程度从第10百分位变化到第90百分位，会使低出生体重率增加12%，早产率增加17%。

31566.title: The Summer Drop in Female Employment
31566.abstract: We provide the first systematic account of summer declines in women’s labor market activity. From May to July, the employment-to-population ratio among prime-age US women declines by 1.1 percentage points, whereas male employment rises; women’s total hours worked fall by 9.8 percent, more than twice the decline among men. School closures for summer break—and corresponding lapses in implicit childcare—provide a unifying explanation for these patterns. The summer drop in female employment aligns with cross-state differences in the timing of school closures, is concentrated among mothers with young school-age children, and coincides with increased time spent engaging in childcare. Decomposing the gender gap in summer work interruptions across job types defined by sector and occupation, we find large contributions from both gender differences in job allocation and gender differences within job types in the propensity to exit employment over the summer. Women’s summer work interruptions contribute to gender gaps in pay: women’s weekly earnings decline by 3.3 percent over the summer months, about five times the decline among men.
31566.zh_abstract: 我们首次系统性地阐述了夏季女性劳动力市场活动的下降。从5月到7月，美国黄金年龄女性的就业人口比率下降了1.1个百分点，而男性就业率则上升；女性的总工作时间下降了9.8%，是男性下降幅度的两倍多。学校因暑假关闭——以及随之而来的隐性儿童照护中断——为这些模式提供了一个统一的解释。女性就业的夏季下降与各州学校关闭时间的差异相一致，主要集中在有年幼学龄儿童的母亲中，并且与花在儿童照护上的时间增加相吻合。通过按行业和职业划分的工作类型对夏季工作中断的性别差距进行分解，我们发现，性别在工作分配上的差异以及性别在同一工作类型内夏季退出就业倾向的差异，都对此有较大贡献。女性的夏季工作中断导致了性别薪酬差距：女性夏季每周收入下降3.3%，约为男性下降幅度的五倍。
31566.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS；JEL：J13, J16, J22, J24

31565.title: Author Country of Origin and Attention on Open Science Platforms: Evidence from COVID-19 Preprints
31565.zh_title: 作者来源国与开放科学平台上的关注度：来自COVID-19预印本的证据
31565.abstract: Online platforms such as preprint servers have become an important way to disseminate new scientific knowledge prior to peer review. However, little is known about how attention to preprints may vary across authors from different countries of origin, particularly relative to evaluation in expert-controlled systems such as scientific journals. This study explores how readers allocated attention across preprints in the initial months of the COVID-19 pandemic, a time when there was an increase in demand for new research and a corresponding increase in the use of preprint platforms around the world. We find that, after controlling carefully for article quality and topic as well as the prominence of the preprint’s ultimate publication outlet, preprints with authors from Chinese institutions receive less attention, and preprints with authors from U.S. institutions receive more attention, than preprints with authors from the rest of the world. In an exploration of potential mechanisms driving the observed effects, we find evidence that when evaluation is more constrained, in terms of lack of knowledge or expertise and increase in time pressure, audiences tend to make greater use of preprint authors’ country of origin as a proxy for quality or relevance. The results suggest that geographic biases may persist or even be exacerbated on platforms designed to promote unfettered access to early research findings.
31565.zh_abstract: 预印本服务器等在线平台已成为在同行评审前传播新科学知识的重要方式。然而，关于来自不同来源国的作者所发布的预印本所获得的关注度如何变化，尤其是在与科学期刊等专家控制系统中的评估相比较时，我们知之甚少。本研究探讨了在COVID-19大流行初期（当时对新研究的需求增加，全球范围内预印本平台的使用也相应增加），读者如何在预印本之间分配关注度。我们发现，在仔细控制了文章质量、主题以及预印本最终发表渠道的知名度后，与来自世界其他地区作者的预印本相比，来自中国机构作者的预印本获得的关注度较低，而来自美国机构作者的预印本获得的关注度较高。在探索驱动所观察效应的潜在机制时，我们发现证据表明，当评估受到更多限制（例如缺乏知识或专业知识以及时间压力增加）时，受众倾向于更多地利用预印本作者的来源国作为质量或相关性的代理指标。结果表明，在旨在促进早期研究成果自由获取的平台上，地理偏见可能持续存在甚至加剧。

31564.title: Testing Above the Limit: Drinking Water Contamination and Test Scores
31564.zh_title: 超标测试：饮用水污染与考试成绩
31564.abstract: This paper provides estimates of the contemporaneous effect of drinking water quality violations on students’ academic achievement. Using student-level test score data with residential addresses, geographic information on water systems, and drinking water violations from North Carolina, I estimate the within-student impacts of poor water quality on student test scores. Exposure to a bacteria violation during the school year decreases math scores by about 0.038 standard deviations when the public is uninformed. Results suggest that poor water quality may impact retention or comprehension of material throughout the school year.
31564.zh_abstract: 本文提供了饮用水质量违规对学生学业成绩同期影响的估计。利用北卡罗来纳州的学生层面考试成绩数据（包含居住地址）、供水系统地理信息以及饮用水违规数据，我估计了水质不佳对学生考试成绩的个体内影响。在公众不知情的情况下，学年期间暴露于细菌违规会使数学成绩下降约0.038个标准差。结果表明，水质不佳可能会影响整个学年中材料的记忆或理解。
31564.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EEE, EH；JEL：I18, I24, Q51, Q53

31563.title: Seniority
31563.abstract: This paper studies the optimal wage structure of a firm with imperfect monitoring of worker effort. We find that when firms can commit to (implicit) long-term contracts, imperfect monitoring leads to optimal wage profiles that reflect worker seniority. We provide a precise measure of seniority as a ratio of co-state variables and illustrate how this measure of seniority evolves over the worker’s tenure with the firm and how it affects wages, effort, and separation rates. We also show how earnings loss from unemployment reflects seniority and how optimal monitoring intensity, amenities and on-the-job training evolve with seniority.
31563.zh_abstract: 本文研究了一个对工人努力程度存在不完全监督的企业的最优工资结构。我们发现，当企业能够承诺（隐性）长期合同时，不完全监督会导致反映工人资历的最优工资曲线。我们提供了一个精确的资历度量，即协态变量的比率，并说明了这种资历度量如何随着工人在企业中的任期演变，以及它如何影响工资、努力程度和离职率。我们还展示了失业导致的收入损失如何反映资历，以及最优监督强度、福利和在职培训如何随资历变化。

31562.title: Who Benefits From The Export-Import Bank Aid?
31562.zh_title: 谁从进出口银行援助中受益？
31562.abstract: We study the effectiveness of government aid to exporters by exploring an exogenous shock that affected the ability of the Export-Import Bank of the United States (EXIM) to provide aid to U.S. exporters through loan guarantees to importers. We focus on Boeing, the largest individual recipient of aid. We find that Boeing sales declined only modestly – despite Boeing’s significant reliance on EXIM for export credit. Moreover, we find that this decline is driven by financially constrained airlines or by airlines operating in countries with underdeveloped financial systems. We show that airlines in developed countries were easily able to substitute EXIM guaranteed loans for private credit and thus could still purchase Boeing aircraft despite the EXIM shock. Our results are consistent with the view that government-sponsored export credit is mostly relevant for importers in countries with underdeveloped financial systems, which represent a relatively small share of total EXIM aid.
31562.zh_abstract: 我们通过研究一个影响美国进出口银行向美国出口商提供援助（通过向进口商提供贷款担保）能力的外生冲击，来探讨政府援助出口商的有效性。我们重点关注波音公司，它是援助的最大个体接受者。我们发现，尽管波音严重依赖进出口银行提供出口信贷，但其销售额仅出现小幅下降。此外，我们发现这种下降是由财务受限的航空公司或在金融体系不发达的国家运营的航空公司所驱动的。我们表明，发达国家的航空公司能够轻易地用私人信贷替代进出口银行担保的贷款，因此尽管受到进出口银行冲击，它们仍能购买波音飞机。我们的结果与以下观点一致：政府支持的出口信贷主要与金融体系不发达国家的进口商相关，而这些国家在进出口银行总援助中所占份额相对较小。
31562.meta: Programs：CF, IFM, ITI；JEL：F14, F34, G28, G31, L93

31561.title: Strategic Money and Credit Ledgers
31561.abstract: This paper studies strategic decision making by a private currency ledger operator, which faces competition from public money and/or other ledgers. A monopoly ledger operator can incentivize contract enforcement across the financial sector by threatening exclusion, but it can also impose markups through its pricing power. Currency competition limits rent extraction, but also makes coordinated contract enforcement more fragile. The emergent market structure bundles the provision of ledger and platform trading technologies. Regulation to ensure platform cooperation on contract enforcement and competition on markup setting is effective so long as agents can easily switch between platforms.
31561.zh_abstract: 本文研究私人货币账本运营商的战略决策，该运营商面临来自公共货币和/或其他账本的竞争。垄断账本运营商可以通过威胁排斥来激励金融部门内的合同执行，但也可以通过其定价权施加加价。货币竞争限制了租金提取，但也使协调的合同执行更加脆弱。涌现的市场结构将账本提供与平台交易技术捆绑在一起。只要代理人能够在平台之间轻松切换，确保平台在合同执行上合作并在加价设定上竞争的监管就是有效的。
31561.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, IO, ME；JEL：E4, E42, E5, E50, E59, F39, G21, G23, L10, L13

31560.title: The Effect of Child Endowment on Fertility Choices
31560.zh_title: 子女禀赋对生育选择的影响
31560.abstract: Does the intellectual endowment of born children affect their parents’ future fertility choices? We study the effect of positive or negative shocks to child endowment on the intensive margin of fertility using data on intellectually gifted and intellectually disabled children. Because families with an exceptional-endowment child differ from those without, we propose quasi-experiments that exploit differences in the child’s birth order to estimate the effect of their birth on further fertility. We find that the birth of a gifted child increases family size. However, parents must be able to recognize the endowment’s exceptional ability for it to have an effect. Similarly, the birth of an intellectually disabled child negatively affects family size, but only when the child is of high birth order. Our results point to child endowment as an important factor in determining fertility choices.
31560.zh_abstract: 已出生子女的智力禀赋是否会影响父母未来的生育选择？我们利用智力超常儿童和智力障碍儿童的数据，研究子女禀赋的正向或负向冲击对生育密集边际的影响。由于拥有特殊禀赋子女的家庭与没有此类子女的家庭不同，我们提出了利用子女出生顺序差异的准实验，来估计其出生对进一步生育的影响。我们发现，天才儿童的出生会增加家庭规模。然而，父母必须能够认识到这种禀赋的卓越能力，才能产生这种效应。同样，智力障碍儿童的出生会对家庭规模产生负面影响，但只有当该儿童出生顺序较高时才会如此。我们的结果表明，子女禀赋是决定生育选择的重要因素。
31560.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I0, J10

31558.title: Artificial Intelligence and Scientific Discovery: A Model of Prioritized Search
31558.zh_title: 人工智能与科学发现：优先搜索模型
31558.authors: Ajay K. Agrawal, John McHale, Alexander Oettl
31558.abstract: We model a key step in the innovation process, hypothesis generation, as the making of predictions over a vast combinatorial space. Traditionally, scientists and innovators use theory or intuition to guide their search. Increasingly, however, they use artificial intelligence (AI) instead. We model innovation as resulting from sequential search over a combinatorial design space, where the prioritization of costly tests is achieved using a predictive model. We represent the ranked output of the predictive model in the form of a hazard function. We then use discrete survival analysis to obtain the main innovation outcomes of interest – the probability of innovation, expected search duration, and expected profit. We describe conditions under which shifting from the traditional method of hypothesis generation, using theory or intuition, to instead using AI that generates higher fidelity predictions, results in a higher likelihood of successful innovation, shorter search durations, and higher expected profits. We then explore the complementarity between hypothesis generation and hypothesis testing; potential gains from AI may not be realized without significant investment in testing capacity. We discuss the policy implications.
31558.zh_abstract: 我们将创新过程中的一个关键步骤——假设生成——建模为在广阔的组合空间中进行预测。传统上，科学家和创新者使用理论或直觉来指导他们的搜索。然而，他们越来越多地使用人工智能（AI）来代替。我们将创新建模为在组合设计空间上的顺序搜索，其中使用预测模型对昂贵测试进行优先级排序。我们以风险函数的形式表示预测模型的排序输出。然后，我们使用离散生存分析来获得主要的创新结果——创新概率、预期搜索持续时间和预期利润。我们描述了从使用理论或直觉的传统假设生成方法转向使用生成更高保真度预测的AI的条件，这会导致更高的成功创新可能性、更短的搜索持续时间和更高的预期利润。然后，我们探讨了假设生成与假设测试之间的互补性；如果没有对测试能力的大量投资，AI的潜在收益可能无法实现。我们讨论了政策含义。

31557.title: The Effect of Medicaid Expansion on the Take-up of Disability Benefits by Race and Ethnicity
31557.zh_title: 医疗补助扩展对按种族和民族划分的残疾福利领取的影响
31557.authors: Becky Staiger, Madeline S. Helfer, Jessica Van Parys
31557.abstract: Public disability programs provide financial support to 12 million working-age individuals per year, though not all eligible individuals take up these programs. Mixed evidence exists regarding the impact of Medicaid eligibility expansion on program take-up, and even less is known about the relationship between Medicaid expansion and racial and ethnic disparities in take-up. Using 2009—2020 Current Population Survey (CPS) data, we compare changes in Supplemental Security Income (SSI) and Social Security Disability Insurance (SSDI) take-up among respondents with disabilities living in Medicaid expansion states to respondents with disabilities living in non-expansion states, before and after Medicaid expansion. We further explore heterogeneity by race/ethnicity. We find that Medicaid expansion reduced SSI take-up by 10% overall, particularly among White and Hispanic respondents (10% and 21%, respectively). Medicaid expansion increased SSDI take-up by 8% overall, particularly among White and Black respondents (9% and 11%, respectively). Moreover, we find that Medicaid expansion reduced the probability that respondents with disabilities had employer-sponsored health insurance by approximately 8%, suggesting that expansion may have reduced job-lock among the SSDI-eligible, contributing to the observed increase in SSDI take-up.
31557.zh_abstract: 公共残疾项目每年为1200万处于工作年龄的个体提供经济支持，但并非所有符合条件的个体都领取这些项目。关于医疗补助资格扩展对项目领取的影响存在混合证据，而关于医疗补助扩展与领取中的种族和民族差异之间的关系则知之更少。使用2009年至2020年当前人口调查（CPS）数据，我们比较了医疗补助扩展前后，生活在扩展州与非扩展州的残疾受访者中补充保障收入（SSI）和社会保障残疾保险（SSDI）领取的变化。我们进一步按种族/民族探讨了异质性。我们发现，医疗补助扩展总体上使SSI领取减少了10%，尤其是在白人和西班牙裔受访者中（分别减少10%和21%）。医疗补助扩展总体上使SSDI领取增加了8%，尤其是在白人和黑人受访者中（分别增加9%和11%）。此外，我们发现医疗补助扩展使残疾受访者拥有雇主提供的健康保险的概率降低了约8%，这表明扩展可能减少了符合SSDI条件者的工作锁定，从而促进了观察到的SSDI领取增加。

31556.title: School Accountability, Long-Run Criminal Activity, and Self-Sufficiency
31556.zh_title: 学校问责制、长期犯罪活动与自给自足
31556.authors: Ozkan Eren, David N. Figlio, Naci H. Mocan, Orgul Ozturk
31556.abstract: This paper examines the impact of school accountability on adult crime and economic self-sufficiency. We employ a unique source of linked administrative data from a Southern state and exploit exogenous variation generated by the state's accountability regime. Our findings indicate that a school's receipt of a lower accountability rating, at the bottom end of the ratings distribution, decreases adult criminal involvement. Accountability pressures also reduce the propensity of students' reliance on social welfare programs in adulthood and these effects persist at least until when individuals reach their early 30s. Further examination reveals that our results are consistent with an explanation related to improvements in human capital accumulation.
31556.zh_abstract: 本文考察了学校问责制对成人犯罪和经济自给自足的影响。我们使用了来自美国南部一个州的独特关联行政数据，并利用了该州问责制产生的外生变异。我们的研究结果表明，学校在评级分布底端获得较低的问责评级，会减少成人的犯罪参与。问责压力还降低了学生成年后依赖社会福利项目的倾向，这些效应至少持续到个体30岁出头。进一步考察表明，我们的结果与人力资本积累改善的解释一致。

31555.title: The Dynastic Benefits of Early Childhood Education: Participant Benefits and Family Spillovers
31555.zh_title: 早期儿童教育的代际收益：参与者收益与家庭溢出效应
31555.authors: Jorge Luis García, Frederik H. Bennhoff, Duncan Ermini Leaf
31555.abstract: We demonstrate the social efficiency of investing in high-quality early childhood education using newly collected data from the HighScope Perry Preschool Project. The data analyzed are the longest follow-up of any randomized early childhood education program. Annual observations of participant outcomes up to midlife allow us to provide a cost-benefit analysis without relying on forecasts. Adult outcomes on the participants' children and siblings allow us to quantify spillover benefits. The program generates a benefit-cost ratio of 6.0 (p-value = 0.03). Spillover benefits increase this ratio to 7.5 (p-value = 0.00).
31555.zh_abstract: 我们利用从HighScope佩里学前项目新收集的数据，证明了投资高质量早期儿童教育的社会效率。所分析的数据是任何随机早期儿童教育项目中最长的跟踪数据。对参与者结果直至中年的年度观察使我们能够在不依赖预测的情况下进行成本效益分析。参与者子女和兄弟姐妹的成人结果使我们能够量化溢出收益。该项目产生的效益成本比为6.0（p值=0.03）。溢出收益将此比率提高到7.5（p值=0.00）。

31554.title: Urban Forests: Environmental Health Values and Risks
31554.zh_title: 城市森林：环境健康价值与风险
31554.authors: Jianwei Xing, Zhiren Hu, Fan Xia, Jintao Xu, Eric Zou
31554.abstract: Urban forests are ubiquitous, yet their impacts and values remain largely unknown. We study a massive urban afforestation policy in Beijing that planted 1/3 of a million acres of greenery in less than a decade. We conduct a remote-sensing audit of the program, finding that it contributes to a substantial greening up of the city. This causes significant downwind air quality improvement, reducing average PM2.5 concentration at city population hubs by 4.2%. Rapid vegetation growth unexpectedly led to a 7.4% increase in pollen exposure. Analysis of medical claims data shows that increased aeroallergens triggered emergency room visits, mirroring pollution effects though much less severe.
