Monetized net health benefits of the program amount to 1.5% of the city’s GDP. Urban forests are only partially capitalized in housing values, with buyers mainly appreciating proximity to green spaces but not the air quality improvements they bring.
31554.zh_abstract: 城市森林无处不在，但其影响和价值在很大程度上仍然未知。我们研究了北京一项大规模的城市绿化政策，该政策在不到十年内种植了33万英亩的绿地。我们对该项目进行了遥感审计，发现它显著增加了城市的绿化程度。这导致了下风方向空气质量的显著改善，使城市人口中心的平均PM2.5浓度降低了4.2%。快速的植被增长意外地导致花粉暴露增加了7.4%。对医疗索赔数据的分析表明，气源性过敏原的增加引发了急诊就诊，这与污染效应相似，但严重程度低得多。该项目的货币化净健康效益相当于该市GDP的1.5%。城市森林仅部分资本化在住房价值中，购房者主要欣赏靠近绿地的便利，而非其带来的空气质量改善。
31554.meta: Programs：EEE, EH, PE；JEL：I18, Q23, Q53, Q56, R11

31553.title: The Impact of Public School Choice: Evidence from Los Angeles' Zones of Choice
31553.zh_title: 公立学校选择的影响：来自洛杉矶“选择区”的证据
31553.abstract: Does a school district that expands school choice provide better outcomes for students than a neighborhood-based assignment system? This paper studies the Zones of Choice (ZOC) program, a school choice initiative of the Los Angeles Unified School District (LAUSD) that created small high school markets in some neighborhoods but left attendance-zone boundaries in place throughout the rest of the district. We study market-level impacts of choice on student achievement and college enrollment using a differences-in-differences design. Student outcomes in ZOC markets increased markedly, narrowing achievement and college enrollment gaps between ZOC neighborhoods and the rest of the district. The effects of ZOC are larger for schools exposed to more competition, supporting the notion that competition is a key channel. Demand estimates suggest families place substantial weight on schools' academic quality, providing schools with competition-induced incentives to improve their effectiveness. The evidence demonstrates that public school choice programs have the potential to improve school quality and reduce neighborhood-based disparities in educational opportunity.
31553.zh_abstract: 一个扩大学校选择的学区是否比基于邻里的分配制度能为学生提供更好的结果？本文研究了“选择区”（ZOC）项目，这是洛杉矶联合学区（LAUSD）的一项学校选择计划，该项目在一些社区创建了小型高中市场，但在学区的其他地区保留了入学区域边界。我们使用双重差分法研究了选择对市场层面学生成绩和大学入学率的影响。ZOC市场中学生的成绩显著提高，缩小了ZOC社区与学区其他地区之间的成绩和大学入学率差距。ZOC对面临更多竞争的学校影响更大，这支持了竞争是关键渠道的观点。需求估计表明，家庭非常重视学校的学术质量，这为学校提供了竞争带来的改进效率的激励。证据表明，公立学校选择项目有潜力提高学校质量，并减少基于邻里的教育机会差距。

31552.title: Trends in Social Security Incentives in Belgium
31552.zh_title: 比利时社会保障激励的趋势
31552.authors: Anne-Lore Fraikin, Alain Jousten, Mathieu Lefebvre
31552.abstract: In Belgium, a series of social security reforms have been implemented over the years with the overarching goal of increasing the labor force participation through better work incentives. Using individual-level administrative data, the paper studies the impact of those incentive-based reforms on observed changes in older workers’ employment patterns. We investigate how social security incentives and particularly their changes over time can explain the retirement decision. We calculate indicators of benefit entitlement and derive retirement incentive measures. Using micro-estimation techniques, we find that more generous retirement provision contribute to earlier retirement. Counterfactual reform simulations show strongly incentivizing effects at lower ages and more mixed results at higher ages – particularly for men.
31552.zh_abstract: 在比利时，多年来实施了一系列社会保障改革，其总体目标是通过更好的工作激励来提高劳动力参与率。本文利用个人层面的行政数据，研究了这些基于激励的改革对观察到的老年工人就业模式变化的影响。我们调查了社会保障激励，特别是其随时间的变化，如何解释退休决策。我们计算了福利应享权利指标，并推导出退休激励措施。使用微观估计技术，我们发现更慷慨的退休福利会导致更早退休。反事实改革模拟显示，在较低年龄有强烈的激励效应，而在较高年龄（尤其是男性）则结果更为复杂。

31551.title: Market Access and Migration: Evidence from the Panama Canal Opening during the First Great Migration
31551.zh_title: 市场准入与移民：第一次大迁徙期间巴拿马运河开通的证据
31551.authors: Sebastian Galiani, Luis F. Jaramillo, Mateo Uribe-Castro
31551.abstract: This paper examines the influence of transportation infrastructure on migration decisions in the context of the Great Migration in the United States. Focusing on the opening of the Panama Canal in 1920, we isolate the effect of improved economic opportunities from reduced migration costs. Using full-count Census data, we find that Southern African American migrants preferred areas with enhanced market access, leading to higher inflows after 1920. The study highlights the inter- play between migrant networks and labor markets in shaping migration patterns. Our findings underscore the significance of local market conditions induced by improvements in local market access in influencing migration decisions during the Great Migration.
31551.zh_abstract: 本文在美国大迁徙的背景下，考察了交通基础设施对移民决策的影响。聚焦于1920年巴拿马运河的开通，我们将改善经济机会的影响与降低移民成本的影响分离开来。利用全量人口普查数据，我们发现南方非裔美国移民更偏好市场准入改善的地区，导致1920年后这些地区的流入量更高。该研究强调了移民网络与劳动力市场在塑造移民模式中的相互作用。我们的发现强调了在大迁徙期间，由当地市场准入改善所引发的当地市场条件在影响移民决策中的重要性。

31550.title: Estimating the Spatial Amplification of Damage Caused by Degradation in the Amazon
31550.zh_title: 估算亚马逊森林退化造成的损害的空间放大效应
31550.authors: Rafael Araujo, Juliano Assunção, Marina Hirota, José A. Scheinkman
31550.abstract: The Amazon rainforests have been undergoing unprecedented levels of human-induced disturbances. In addition to local impacts, such changes are likely to cascade following the eastern-western atmospheric flow generated by trade winds. We propose a model of spatial and temporal interactions created by this flow to estimate the spread of local disturbances to downwind locations along atmospheric trajectories. The spatial component captures cascading effects propagated by neighboring regions while the temporal component captures persistence. All these network effects can be described by a single matrix, acting as a spatial multiplier that amplifies local disturbances. This matrix can be used to easily map where the damage of an initial forest disturbance is amplified and propagated to. We identify regions that are likely to cause the largest impact throughout the basin, and those that are the most vulnerable to shocks caused by remote deforestation. On average, the presence of cascading effects mediated by winds doubles the impact of an initial damage. However, there is heterogeneity in this impact. While damage in some regions does not propagate, in others amplification may reach 250%.
31550.zh_abstract: 亚马逊雨林正遭受前所未有的人为干扰。除了局部影响外，这些变化很可能沿着信风产生的东-西大气流级联传播。我们提出了一个由这种气流产生的空间和时间相互作用模型，以估计局部干扰沿大气轨迹向下风位置的扩散。空间分量捕捉了由邻近区域传播的级联效应，而时间分量则捕捉了持续性。所有这些网络效应都可以用一个单一的矩阵来描述，该矩阵作为一个空间乘数，放大了局部干扰。该矩阵可用于轻松绘制初始森林损害的放大和传播区域。我们识别出可能对整个流域造成最大影响的区域，以及最容易受到远程森林砍伐冲击的区域。平均而言，由风介导的级联效应的存在使初始损害的影响加倍。然而，这种影响存在异质性。虽然某些地区的损害不会传播，但在其他地区，放大效应可能达到250%。

31549.title: Micro vs Macro Labor Supply Elasticities: The Role of Dynamic Returns to Effort
31549.zh_title: 微观与宏观劳动力供给弹性：努力动态回报的作用
31549.authors: Henrik Kleven, Claus Thustrup Kreiner, Kristian Larsen, Jakob Egholt Søgaard
31549.abstract: We investigate long-run earnings responses to taxes in the presence of dynamic returns to effort. First, we develop a theoretical model of earnings determination with dynamic returns to effort. In this model, earnings responses are delayed and mediated by job switches. Second, using administrative data from Denmark, we verify our model’s predictions about earnings and hours-worked patterns over the lifecycle. Third, we provide a quasi-experimental analysis of long-run earnings elasticities. Informed by our model, the empirical strategy exploits variation among job switchers. We find that the long-run elasticity is around 0.5, considerably larger than the short-run elasticity of roughly 0.2.
31549.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在存在努力动态回报的情况下，收入对税收的长期反应。首先，我们建立了一个具有努力动态回报的收入决定理论模型。在该模型中，收入反应是延迟的，并通过工作转换来调节。其次，利用丹麦的行政数据，我们验证了模型关于生命周期中收入和工时模式的预测。第三，我们提供了长期收入弹性的准实验分析。根据我们的模型，实证策略利用了工作转换者之间的差异。我们发现长期弹性约为0.5，远大于约0.2的短期弹性。
31549.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PE；JEL：C1, D6, E6, H2, H3, J2, J3

31548.title: Unpacking P-Hacking and Publication Bias
31548.zh_title: 解析P值操纵与发表偏倚
31548.authors: Abel Brodeur, Scott E. Carrell, David N. Figlio, Lester R. Lusher
31548.abstract: We use unique data from journal submissions to identify and unpack publication bias and p-hacking. We find that initial submissions display significant bunching, suggesting the distribution among published statistics cannot be fully attributed to a publication bias in peer review. Desk-rejected manuscripts display greater heaping than those sent for review i.e. marginally significant results are more likely to be desk rejected. Reviewer recommendations, in contrast, are positively associated with statistical significance. Overall, the peer review process has little effect on the distribution of test statistics. Lastly, we track rejected papers and present evidence that the prevalence of publication biases is perhaps not as prominent as feared.
31548.zh_abstract: 我们利用来自期刊投稿的独特数据来识别和解析发表偏倚和P值操纵。我们发现，初始投稿显示出显著的聚集现象，这表明已发表统计数据的分布不能完全归因于同行评审中的发表偏倚。被直接拒稿的稿件比送审的稿件显示出更大的堆积现象，即边际显著的结果更有可能被直接拒稿。相比之下，审稿人的推荐与统计显著性呈正相关。总体而言，同行评审过程对检验统计量的分布影响很小。最后，我们追踪被拒稿件，并提供证据表明发表偏倚的普遍性可能不像人们担心的那样突出。

31547.title: Selling Subscriptions
31547.authors: Liran Einav, Benjamin Klopack, Neale Mahoney
31547.abstract: Retailers are increasingly selling goods and services via subscriptions instead of spot markets. In this paper, we study one benefit to the retailer of selling subscriptions: the possibility that – presumably because of inattention or inertia – consumers continue to pay for subscriptions after the flow benefit falls below its price. We use comprehensive data from a large payment card network and focus on credit and debit cards that get replaced (e.g., due to expiration). Replaced cards require an active subscription renewal decision, and we document that months during which cards are replaced are associated with much higher rates of cancellation for the ten subscriptions we study. We write down and estimate a stylized model of subscription renewals that allows us to recover the baseline degree of inattention. We find that estimated inattention is higher for consumers that took cash advances, a proxy for low financial sophistication. Relative to a counterfactual in which consumers are fully attentive, inattention raises seller revenues by between 14% and more than 200%. We use the estimated model to explore the quantitative impact of possible regulatory remedies.
31547.zh_abstract: 零售商越来越多地通过订阅而非现货市场销售商品和服务。在本文中，我们研究了零售商销售订阅的一个好处：消费者（可能由于疏忽或惯性）在流量收益低于其价格后继续支付订阅费用的可能性。我们使用来自大型支付卡网络的综合数据，重点关注被更换（例如，由于到期）的信用卡和借记卡。更换卡需要主动的订阅续订决策，我们记录到，在我们研究的十种订阅中，卡被更换的月份与更高的取消率相关。我们构建并估计了一个简化的订阅续订模型，该模型使我们能够恢复基准的疏忽程度。我们发现，对于使用现金预支（作为金融素养较低的一个代理变量）的消费者，估计的疏忽程度更高。与消费者完全注意的反事实情况相比，疏忽使卖方收入增加了14%到超过200%。我们利用估计的模型来探索可能的监管补救措施的量化影响。

31546.title: The Effects of Social Insurance Benefits on Leaving Employment at Older Ages in the Netherlands
31546.zh_title: 荷兰社会保障福利对老年离职的影响
31546.abstract: In the Netherlands, from 1989 to 2013, in the age group 55-63 the annual exit rate from employment to receiving social insurance benefits in the following year decreased from around 17 percent to 7 percent for men, and from 14 percent to 5 percent for women. We found that less generous social insurance benefits have had small but significant negative effects on these exit rates: The annual exit rate to social insurance benefit receipt next year (at ages 56-64) would have been about 14 percent higher for both men and women in 2013 should social insurance benefits schemes of 1989 still have been in place. This increase amounts to staying, on average, three months longer in employment from age 55 onwards in 2013 than in 1989. These findings are driven to some extent by the reduction in the maximum duration of unemployment insurance benefits in 2007, but predominantly by making (early) retirement schemes actuarially fair from 2006 onwards. The increase in disability insurance’s income replacement rate in 2006 has led to a slight increase in the exit rate from employment, conditional on eligibility. As the estimated effects of changes in the social insurance benefits from 1989 to 2013 on working beyond age 55 are relatively small, they suggest the importance of other factors such as changes in workers’ skills, improved health (on which we provide some evidence), and social insurance’s tighter eligibility criteria.
31546.zh_abstract: 在荷兰，从1989年到2013年，在55-63岁年龄组中，男性从就业状态转为在下一年领取社会保障福利的年退出率从约17%下降到7%，女性从14%下降到5%。我们发现，较不慷慨的社会保障福利对这些退出率产生了虽小但显著的负面影响：如果1989年的社会保障福利计划仍然存在，2013年男性和女性在56-64岁期间下一年转为领取社会保障福利的年退出率将高出约14%。这一增长相当于在2013年，从55岁起平均比1989年多工作三个月。这些发现在一定程度上是由2007年失业保险福利最长期限的缩短所驱动的，但主要是由2006年起使（提前）退休计划在精算上公平所驱动的。2006年残疾保险收入替代率的提高，导致在符合条件的情况下，就业退出率略有上升。由于估计的1989年至2013年社会保障福利变化对55岁以上就业的影响相对较小，这表明其他因素的重要性，例如工人技能的变化、健康状况的改善（我们对此提供了一些证据）以及社会保障更严格的资格标准。

31545.title: Divorce and Property Division Laws Shape Human Capital Investment
31545.zh_title: 离婚与财产分割法如何塑造人力资本投资
31545.abstract: In theory, unilateral divorce laws alter the private incentive to invest in human capital by permitting either spouse to initiate the division of the marital assets. Using several causal research designs we show that both men and women are less likely to attain a bachelor’s degree in states with unilateral divorce laws—especially individuals who were exposed to the laws when making educational choices and who live in states requiring an even split of assets upon divorce. Unilateral divorce laws do not distort human capital investment generically—but rather in contexts where the property division laws invite moral hazard.
31545.zh_abstract: 理论上，单方无过错离婚法通过允许配偶任何一方启动婚姻资产分割，改变了人力资本投资的私人激励。利用多种因果研究设计，我们发现在实行单方无过错离婚法的州，男性和女性获得学士学位的可能性均较低——尤其是那些在做出教育选择时已受该法律影响、且居住在要求离婚时资产均分州的个体。单方无过错离婚法并非普遍扭曲人力资本投资，而是在财产分割法引发道德风险的情境下才产生这种效应。
31545.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LE, LS；JEL：D13, J12, J13, J24, K11, K12, K36

31544.title: Why Global and Local Solutions of Open-Economy Models with Incomplete Markets Differ and Why it Matters
31544.zh_title: 为何不完全市场开放经济模型的全局解与局部解存在差异及其重要性
31544.authors: Oliver de Groot, Ceyhun Bora Durdu, Enrique G. Mendoza
31544.abstract: Global and local methods used to study open-economy incomplete-markets models yield different cyclical moments, impulse responses, spectral densities and precautionary savings. Endowment and RBC model solutions obtained with first-order, higher-order, and risky-steady-state local methods are compared with fixed-point-iteration global solutions. Analytic and numerical results show that the differences are due to the near-unit-root nature of net foreign assets under incomplete markets and inaccuracies of local methods in computing their autocorrelation. In a Sudden Stops model, quasi-linear methods that handle occasionally binding constraints understate the size of credit constraint multipliers, financial premia and macroeconomic responses.
31544.zh_abstract: 用于研究开放经济不完全市场模型的全局方法和局部方法会得出不同的周期矩、脉冲响应、谱密度和预防性储蓄。我们将通过一阶、高阶和风险稳态局部方法获得的禀赋模型和RBC模型解，与通过不动点迭代获得的全局解进行比较。解析和数值结果表明，这些差异源于不完全市场下净外国资产的近单位根性质，以及局部方法在计算其自相关性时的不准确性。在“骤停”模型中，处理偶尔有约束条件的准线性方法会低估信贷约束乘数、金融溢价和宏观经济响应的规模。

31543.title: Managing an Energy Shock: Fiscal and Monetary Policy
31543.zh_title: 应对能源冲击：财政与货币政策
31543.authors: Adrien Auclert, Hugo Monnery, Matthew Rognlie, Ludwig Straub
31543.abstract: This paper studies the macroeconomic effects of energy price shocks in energy-importing economies using a heterogeneous-agent New Keynesian model. When MPCs are realistically large and the elasticity of substitution between energy and domestic goods is realistically low, increases in energy prices depress real incomes and cause a recession, even if the central bank does not tighten monetary policy. Imported energy inflation can spill over to wage inflation through a wage-price spiral, but this does not mitigate the decline in real wages. Monetary tightening has limited effect on imported inflation when done in isolation, but can be powerful when done in coordination with other energy importers by lowering world energy demand. Fiscal policy, especially energy price subsidies, can isolate individual energy importers from the shock, but it has large negative externalities on other economies.
31543.zh_abstract: 本文利用异质性主体新凯恩斯模型，研究能源进口经济体中能源价格冲击的宏观经济效应。当边际消费倾向（MPC）现实地较高，且能源与国内商品之间的替代弹性现实地较低时，能源价格上涨会压低实际收入并引发经济衰退，即使央行不收紧货币政策。进口能源通胀可能通过工资-价格螺旋传导至工资通胀，但这并不能缓解实际工资的下降。单独实施的货币紧缩对进口通胀影响有限，但若与其他能源进口国协调行动，通过降低全球能源需求，则可产生强大效果。财政政策，尤其是能源价格补贴，能使单个能源进口国免受冲击，但会对其他经济体产生巨大的负外部性。
31543.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E52, F42, Q43

31539.title: Workers and the Green-Energy Transition: Evidence from 300 Million Job Transitions
31539.zh_title: 工人与绿色能源转型：来自3亿次职业转换的证据
31539.authors: E. Mark Curtis, Layla O'Kane, R. Jisung Park
31539.abstract: Using micro-data representing over 130 million online work profiles, we explore transitions into and out of jobs most likely to be affected by a transition away from carbon-intensive production technologies. Exploiting detailed textual data on job title, firm name, occupation, and industry to focus on workers employed in carbon-intensive (“dirty”) and non-carbon-intensive (“green”) jobs, we find that the rate of transition from dirty to green jobs is rising rapidly, increasing ten-fold over the period 2005-2021 including a significant uptick in EV-related jobs in recent years. Overall however, fewer than 1 percent of all workers who leave a dirty job appear to transition to a green job. We find that the persistence of employment within dirty industries varies enormously across local labor markets; in some states, over half of all transitions out of dirty jobs are into other dirty jobs. Older workers and those without a college education appear less likely to make transitions to green jobs, and more likely to transition to other dirty jobs, other jobs, or non-employment. When accounting for the fact that green jobs tend to have later start dates, it appears that green and dirty jobs have roughly comparable job durations.
31539.zh_abstract: 利用代表超过1.3亿在线工作档案的微观数据，我们探讨了进出最可能受远离碳密集型生产技术转型影响的职业的转换情况。利用关于职位名称、公司名称、职业和行业的详细文本数据，聚焦于从事碳密集型（“肮脏”）和非碳密集型（“绿色”）工作的工人，我们发现从肮脏工作向绿色工作的转换率正在迅速上升，在2005年至2021年间增长了十倍，包括近年来与电动汽车相关工作的显著增加。然而总体而言，离开肮脏工作的所有工人中，似乎只有不到1%转换到了绿色工作。我们发现，肮脏行业内的就业持续性在不同地方劳动力市场之间存在巨大差异；在某些州，超过一半的肮脏工作转换是转向其他肮脏工作。年长工人和未受过大学教育的工人似乎不太可能转向绿色工作，而更可能转向其他肮脏工作、其他工作或非就业状态。考虑到绿色工作往往有较晚的起始日期，绿色工作和肮脏工作似乎具有大致相当的工作持续时间。

31592.title: Inventor Gender and Patent Undercitation: Evidence from Causal Text Estimation
31592.zh_title: 发明人性别与专利被引不足：来自因果文本估计的证据
31592.authors: Yael Hochberg, Ali Kakhbod, Peiyao Li, Kunal Sachdeva
31592.abstract: Implementing a state-of-the-art machine learning technique for causal identification from text data (C-TEXT), we document that patents authored by female inventors are under-cited relative to those authored by males. Relative to what the same patent would be predicted to receive had the lead inventor instead been male, patents with a female lead inventor receive 10% fewer citations. Patents with male lead inventors tend to undercite past patents with female lead inventors, while patent examiners of both genders appear to be more even-handed in the citations they add to patent applications. For female inventors, market-based measures of patent value load significantly on the citation counts that would be predicted by C-TEXT, but do not load significantly on actual forward citations. The under-recognition of female-authored patents likely has implications for the allocation of talent in the economy.
31592.zh_abstract: 通过实施一种用于从文本数据中进行因果识别的最先进机器学习技术（C-TEXT），我们记录了由女性发明人撰写的专利相对于男性发明人撰写的专利被引次数较少。与同一专利在首席发明人为男性时预计会获得的引用次数相比，首席发明人为女性的专利获得的引用次数少10%。首席发明人为男性的专利倾向于少引过去由女性发明人撰写的专利，而不同性别的专利审查员在他们添加到专利申请中的引用方面似乎更为公平。对于女性发明人而言，基于市场的专利价值指标显著依赖于C-TEXT预测的引用次数，但并不显著依赖于实际的前向引用。对女性发明人专利的认可不足可能对经济中的人才配置产生影响。
31592.meta: Programs：CF, PR；JEL：C13, J16, J24, J71, O30

31591.title: State Capacity as an Organizational Problem. Evidence from the Growth of the U.S. State Over 100 Years
31591.zh_title: 作为组织问题的国家能力：来自美国百年国家扩张的证据
31591.abstract: We study how the organization of the state evolves over the process of development of a nation, using a new dataset on the internal organization of the U.S. federal bureaucracy over 1817- 1905. First, we show a series of novel facts, describing how the size of the state, its presence across the territory, and its key organizational features evolved over the nineteenth century. Second, exploiting the staggered expansion of the railroad and telegraph networks across space, we show that the ability of politicians to monitor state agents throughout the territory is an important driver of these facts: locations with lower transportation and communication costs with Washington DC have more state presence, are delegated more decision power, and have lower employee turnover. The results suggest that high monitoring costs are associated with small, personalistic state organizations based on networks of trust; technological innovations lowering monitoring costs facilitate the emergence of modern bureaucratic states.
31591.zh_abstract: 我们利用1817年至1905年间美国联邦官僚机构内部组织的新数据集，研究国家组织如何在一个国家的发展过程中演变。首先，我们展示了一系列新事实，描述了19世纪国家规模、其在全国范围内的存在以及其关键组织特征如何演变。其次，利用铁路和电报网络在不同地区的交错扩张，我们表明政治家监控全国范围内国家代理人的能力是这些事实的重要驱动因素：与华盛顿特区交通和通信成本较低的地点拥有更多的国家存在、被授予更多的决策权以及更低的员工流动率。结果表明，高监控成本与基于信任网络的小型、个人化的国家组织相关；降低监控成本的技术创新促进了现代官僚国家的出现。

31590.title: Infrastructure and Finance: Evidence from India's GQ Highway Network
31590.zh_title: 基础设施与金融：来自印度黄金四边形高速公路网络的证据
31590.authors: Abhiman Das, Ejaz Ghani, Arti Grover Goswami, William R. Kerr, Ramana Nanda
31590.abstract: We use data from Reserve Bank of India to study the impact of India's Golden Quadrilateral (GQ) highway project on finance-dependent activity. Loan volumes increase by 20-30% in districts along GQ and are stronger in industries more dependent upon external finance. Loan growth begins with increases in average branch size and in places with more pre-GQ loan activity. New branch openings come later, consistent with short-run adjustment costs to expanding branch networks. These patterns are not evident in placebo tests using delayed investments in NS-EW highways. Results suggest the depth of initial financial infrastructure shapes how infrastructure investments impact localities.
31590.zh_abstract: 我们利用印度储备银行的数据研究印度黄金四边形（GQ）高速公路项目对金融依赖型活动的影响。GQ沿线地区的贷款额增加了20-30%，并且在更依赖外部融资的行业中这种效应更强。贷款增长始于平均分行规模的增加以及GQ前贷款活动较多的地区。新分行的开设则较晚，这与扩大分行网络的短期调整成本一致。这些模式在使用延迟投资的NS-EW高速公路的安慰剂检验中并不明显。结果表明，初始金融基础设施的深度决定了基础设施投资如何影响地方经济。
31590.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, PE, PR；JEL：G21, H4, O18, R12, R14, R33, R42

31589.title: Domino Secessions: Evidence from the U.S.
31589.zh_title: 多米诺骨牌式脱离：来自美国的证据
31589.authors: Jean Lacroix, Kris James Mitchener, Kim Oosterlinck
31589.abstract: A secession movement is an uncertain process that evolves over time. We develop a simple theoretical framework in which regions use news to update their decisions to secede. Uncertainty and economies of scale are necessary conditions to observe “domino secessions” – sequential interdependent secessions. Empirically, we use geographically-specific assets (state bonds) to assess how uncertainty and economies of scale influenced some slaveholding states’ decisions to secede from the U.S. in the 1860s. Uncertainty prevailed over the outcome of the secession movement with financial markets updating their priors on potential seceders at the election of Abraham Lincoln, but also every time a state seceded. We further document that financial markets priced in economies of scale to both state and federal debt.
31589.zh_abstract: 脱离运动是一个随时间演变的不确定过程。我们构建了一个简单的理论框架，其中地区利用新闻来更新其脱离决策。不确定性和规模经济是观察到“多米诺骨牌式脱离”（即连续的相互依赖的脱离）的必要条件。在实证中，我们利用地理特定的资产（州债券）来评估不确定性和规模经济如何影响1860年代一些蓄奴州脱离美国的决策。在亚伯拉罕·林肯当选时，以及每次一个州脱离时，金融市场都会更新其对潜在脱离者的先验信念，这表明脱离运动的结果存在不确定性。我们进一步证明，金融市场对州债和联邦债都定价了规模经济。

31588.title: Industry Wage Differentials: A Firm-Based Approach
31588.zh_title: 行业工资差异：基于企业的方法
31588.authors: David Card, Jesse Rothstein, Moises Yi
31588.abstract: We revisit the estimation of industry wage differentials using linked employer-employee data from the U.S. LEHD program. Building on recent advances in the measurement of employer wage premiums, we define the industry wage effect as the employment-weighted average workplace premium in that industry. We show that cross-sectional estimates of industry differentials overstate the pay premiums due to unmeasured worker heterogeneity. Conversely, estimates based on industry movers understate the true premiums, due to unmeasured heterogeneity in pay premiums within industries. Industry movers who switch to higher-premium industries tend to leave firms in the origin sector that pay above-average premiums and move to firms in the destination sector with below-average premiums (and vice versa), attenuating the measured industry effects. Our preferred estimates reveal substantial heterogeneity in narrowly-defined industry premiums, with a standard deviation of 12%. On average, workers in higher-paying industries have higher observed and unobserved skills, widening between-industry wage inequality. There are also small but systematic differences in industry premiums across cities, with a wider distribution of pay premiums and more worker sorting in cities with more high-premium firms and high-skilled workers.
31588.zh_abstract: 我们利用美国LEHD项目中的关联雇主-雇员数据重新审视行业工资差异的估计。基于雇主工资溢价测量的最新进展，我们将行业工资效应定义为该行业内就业加权平均的工作场所溢价。我们表明，行业差异的横截面估计由于未测量的工人异质性而高估了工资溢价。相反，基于行业流动者的估计由于行业内工资溢价的未测量异质性而低估了真实溢价。转向更高溢价行业的行业流动者往往离开原行业中支付高于平均溢价的雇主，并前往目标行业中支付低于平均溢价的雇主（反之亦然），从而削弱了测量的行业效应。我们偏好的估计揭示了狭义定义行业溢价的显著异质性，标准差为12%。平均而言，高薪行业的工人具有更高的可观测和不可观测技能，从而扩大了行业间工资不平等。不同城市之间的行业溢价也存在微小但系统的差异，在拥有更多高溢价企业和高技能工人的城市，工资溢价分布更广，工人分类更明显。

31587.title: Location, Location, Location
31587.authors: David Card, Jesse Rothstein, Moises Yi
31587.abstract: We use data from the Longitudinal Employer-Household Dynamics program to study the causal effects of location on earnings. Starting from a model with employer and employee fixed effects, we estimate the average earnings premiums associated with jobs in different commuting zones (CZs) and different CZ-industry pairs. About half of the variation in mean wages across CZs is attributable to differences in worker ability (as measured by their fixed effects); the other half is attributable to place effects. We show that the place effects from a richly specified cross sectional wage model overstate the causal effects of place (due to unobserved worker ability), while those from a model that simply adds person fixed effects understate the causal effects (due to unobserved heterogeneity in the premiums paid by different firms in the same CZ). Local industry agglomerations are associated with higher wages, but overall differences in industry composition and in CZ-specific returns to industries explain only a small fraction of average place effects. Estimating separate place effects for college and non-college workers, we find that the college wage gap is bigger in larger and higher-wage places, but that two-thirds of this variation is attributable to differences in the relative skills of the two groups in different places. Most of the remaining variation reflects the enhanced sorting of more educated workers to higher-paying industries in larger and higher-wage CZs. Finally, we find that local housing costs at least fully offset local pay premiums, implying that workers who move to larger CZs have no higher net-of-housing consumption.
31587.zh_abstract: 我们利用纵向雇主-家庭动态项目的数据研究区位对收入的因果效应。从一个包含雇主和雇员固定效应的模型出发，我们估算了不同通勤区（CZ）以及不同CZ-行业配对中工作的平均收入溢价。各CZ平均工资差异中约一半可归因于工人能力（以其固定效应衡量）的差异；另一半可归因于区位效应。我们表明，来自详细设定的横截面工资模型的区位效应高估了区位的因果效应（由于未观测到的工人能力），而来自仅添加个人固定效应的模型的区位效应则低估了因果效应（由于同一CZ内不同企业支付的溢价的未观测异质性）。地方产业集聚与更高的工资相关，但产业构成和CZ特定产业回报率的总体差异仅解释了平均区位效应的一小部分。分别估计大学和非大学工人的区位效应，我们发现大学工资差距在更大和工资更高的地方更大，但这种变动的三分之二可归因于两组工人在不同地方相对技能的差异。剩余的大部分变动反映了更多受教育工人向更大和更高工资CZ中更高薪行业的增强分类。最后，我们发现地方住房成本至少完全抵消了地方工资溢价，这意味着迁移到更大CZ的工人没有更高的扣除住房后的消费。

31586.title: Plata y Plomo: How Higher Wages Expose Politicians to Criminal Violence
31586.zh_title: 金钱与子弹：更高工资如何使政客暴露于犯罪暴力
31586.abstract: Adequate wages are an important tool to shield public officials from special interests and corruption. But what is the equilibrium effect of higher wages in the presence of criminal pressure groups, who use both bribes and violence? By means of a regression discontinuity design, we show that an increase in the remuneration of Italian municipal cabinets triggers a sizable and significant increase in criminal attacks against their members. We argue that this is triggered by higher-paid officials' lower likelihood of catering to criminal interests. In particular, we show that better-paid politicians are significantly more likely to prevent corruption in public procurement, a key area of illicit interactions between the state and criminal organizations. Additional analyses reveal that the disciplining effect of wages is driven by a change in incumbents' behavior rather than improved selection. These findings reveal how -- in the presence of criminal groups -- higher wages may limit corruption, but also foster the use of violence as an alternative tool to influence policymaking.
31586.zh_abstract: 充足的工资是保护公职人员免受特殊利益和腐败影响的重要工具。但在存在同时使用贿赂和暴力的犯罪压力集团的情况下，更高工资的均衡效应是什么？通过断点回归设计，我们表明意大利市政内阁薪酬的增加会引发对其成员犯罪攻击的大幅且显著的增加。我们认为，这是由于高薪官员迎合犯罪利益的可能性降低所致。具体而言，我们表明薪酬更高的政客显著更有可能防止公共采购中的腐败，这是国家与犯罪组织之间非法互动的关键领域。额外分析揭示，工资的约束效应是由现任者行为的改变而非更好的筛选所驱动。这些发现揭示了在存在犯罪集团的情况下，更高工资可能限制腐败，但也促使暴力作为影响政策制定的替代工具。

31585.title: Population Aging and Economic Growth: From Demographic Dividend to Demographic Drag?
31585.zh_title: 人口老龄化与经济增长：从人口红利到人口拖累？
31585.abstract: This paper examines the extent to which changes in working-age shares associated with population aging might slow economic growth in upcoming years. We first analyze the economic effects of changing working-age shares in a standard empirical growth model using country panel data from 1950–2015. We then juxtapose the estimates with predicted shifts in population age structure to project economic growth in 2020–2050. Our results indicate that population aging will slow economic growth throughout much of the world. Expansions of labor supply due to improvements in functional capacity among older people can cushion much of this demographic drag.
31585.zh_abstract: 本文考察了与人口老龄化相关的劳动年龄人口份额变化在未来几年可能减缓经济增长的程度。我们首先使用1950-2015年的跨国面板数据，在一个标准实证增长模型中分析了劳动年龄人口份额变化的经济效应。然后，我们将这些估计值与人口年龄结构的预测变化相结合，以预测2020-2050年的经济增长。我们的结果表明，人口老龄化将减缓世界大部分地区的经济增长。由于老年人功能能力改善而带来的劳动力供给扩张，可以缓冲这种人口拖累的很大一部分。
31585.meta: Programs：AG, DEV, EFG, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I15, J11, O11, O47

31584.title: Micro MPCs and Macro Counterfactuals: The Case of the 2008 Rebates
31584.zh_title: 微观边际消费倾向与宏观反事实：以2008年退税为例
31584.authors: Jacob Orchard, Valerie A. Ramey, Johannes F. Wieland
31584.abstract: We present evidence that the high estimated MPCs from the leading household studies result in implausible macroeconomic counterfactuals. Using the 2008 tax rebate as a case study, we calibrate a standard medium-scale New Keynesian model with the estimated micro MPCs to construct counterfactual macroeconomic consumption paths in the absence of a rebate. The counterfactual paths imply that consumption expenditures would have plummeted in spring and summer 2008 and then recovered when Lehman Brothers failed in September 2008. We use narratives and forecasts to argue that these paths are implausible. We then show that standard two-way fixed effect estimates of the micro MPCs are upward biased. When we correct for the biases, we estimate smaller micro MPCs than the previous literature. We also show that reasonable modifications of the model result in general equilibrium forces that dampen rather than amplify micro MPCs. The combination of smaller micro MPCs and dampening general equilibrium forces implies general equilibrium consumption multipliers that are below 0.2.
31584.zh_abstract: 我们提供的证据表明，主要家庭研究估计的高边际消费倾向导致了不合理的宏观反事实。以2008年退税为例，我们校准了一个包含估计的微观边际消费倾向的标准中等规模新凯恩斯模型，以构建没有退税情况下的反事实宏观消费路径。这些反事实路径表明，消费支出本应在2008年春季和夏季骤降，然后在2008年9月雷曼兄弟倒闭时恢复。我们使用叙事和预测来论证这些路径是不合理的。然后，我们证明微观边际消费倾向的标准双向固定效应估计存在向上偏误。当我们纠正这些偏误时，我们估计的微观边际消费倾向小于先前文献。我们还表明，对模型的合理修改会导致一般均衡力量抑制而非放大微观边际消费倾向。较小的微观边际消费倾向与抑制性一般均衡力量的结合意味着一般均衡消费乘数低于0.2。

31583.title: Machine Forecast Disagreement
31583.authors: Turan G. Bali, Bryan T. Kelly, Mathis Mörke, Jamil Rahman
31583.abstract: We propose a statistical model of heterogeneous beliefs where investors are represented as different machine learning model specifications. Investors form return forecasts from their individual models using common data inputs. We measure disagreement as forecast dispersion across investor-models (MFD). Our measure aligns with analyst forecast disagreement but more powerfully predicts returns. We document a large and robust association between belief disagreement and future returns. A decile spread portfolio that sells stocks with high disagreement and buys stocks with low disagreement earns a value-weighted return of 14% per year. Further analyses suggest MFD-alpha is mispricing induced by short-sale costs and limits-to-arbitrage.
31583.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个异质性信念的统计模型，其中投资者被表示为不同的机器学习模型规格。投资者使用共同的数据输入从其个体模型形成收益预测。我们将分歧衡量为投资者模型之间的预测离散度（MFD）。我们的指标与分析师的预测分歧一致，但能更有效地预测收益。我们记录了信念分歧与未来收益之间显著且稳健的关联。一个十分位价差投资组合，卖出高分歧股票并买入低分歧股票，每年可获得14%的价值加权收益。进一步分析表明，MFD-alpha是由卖空成本和套利限制引起的错误定价。
31583.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：C15, C4, C45, C58, G1, G10, G17, G4, G40

31582.title: Organizational Responses to Product Cycles
31582.zh_title: 组织对产品周期的响应
31582.authors: Achyuta Adhvaryu, Vittorio Bassi, Anant Nyshadham, Jorge A. Tamayo, Nicolas Torres
31582.abstract: We use daily administrative data from a leading automobile manufacturer to study the organizational impacts of introducing new models to the auto assembly line. We first show that costly defects per vehicle spike when new models are introduced. As a response, the firm trains in problem-solving skills and promotes lower- and mid-level employees to solve the more complex problems that arise, thus moving to a less pyramidal knowledge hierarchy with fewer layers. We develop an extension to the classic theory of knowledge-based hierarchies that reconciles our novel empirical results by allowing the firm to also invest in its training resources.
31582.zh_abstract: 我们使用一家领先汽车制造商的每日行政数据，研究将新车型引入汽车装配线对组织的影响。我们首先表明，当引入新车型时，每辆车的高成本缺陷会激增。作为回应，公司培训问题解决技能，并提拔中低层员工来解决出现的更复杂问题，从而转向层级更少、金字塔式知识层级更扁平的结构。我们扩展了经典的知识层级理论，通过允许公司也投资于其培训资源，来调和我们的新颖实证结果。
31582.meta: Programs：DEV, LS, PR；JEL：D22, M12, M53, O3

31581.title: The Impact of Criminal Financial Sanctions: A Multi-State Analysis of Survey and Administrative Data
31581.zh_title: 刑事经济制裁的影响：基于调查和行政数据的多州分析
31581.authors: Keith Finlay, Matthew Gross, Carl Lieberman, Elizabeth Luh, Michael G. Mueller-Smith
31581.abstract: We estimate the impact of financial sanctions in the U.S. criminal justice system using nine distinct natural experiments across five states. These regression discontinuity designs capture a range of enforcement levels ($\$17$–$\$6,000$) and institutional environments, providing robust causal evidence and external validity. We leverage survey and administrative data to consider a variety of short and long-term outcomes including employment, recidivism, household expenditures, spousal spillovers, and other self-reported measures of well-being. We find consistent, robust evidence of precise null effects on the population, including ruling out long-run impacts larger than -$\$347$–$\$168$ in annual earnings and -0.002–0.01 in annual convictions.
31581.zh_abstract: 我们利用跨越五个州的九个不同自然实验，估计了美国刑事司法系统中经济制裁的影响。这些断点回归设计涵盖了广泛的执法力度（17美元至6000美元）和制度环境，提供了稳健的因果证据和外部有效性。我们利用调查和行政数据，考虑了各种短期和长期结果，包括就业、累犯、家庭支出、配偶溢出效应以及其他自我报告的福祉指标。我们发现了一致且稳健的证据，表明对总体人口存在精确的零效应，包括排除了长期影响大于年收入-347至-168美元以及年定罪次数-0.002至0.01的可能性。

31580.title: Roots of Inequality
31580.authors: Oded Galor, Marc Klemp, Daniel C. Wainstock
31580.abstract: Why does inequality vary across societies? Why are some societies more unequal than others? We advance the hypothesis that in a market economy, where income differentials reflect variations in productive traits, a significant share of cross-societal differences in inequality may reflect enduring variation in the degree of diversity within societies, rooted in the prehistoric Out-of-Africa migration. Patterns of inequality within the U.S. population are consistent with this hypothesis, suggesting that disparities among groups originating from different ancestral societies are associated with the degree of diversity in productive traits within those societies, shaped during humanity's dispersal from Africa. Consistent with the proposed mechanism, populations whose ancestors originated closer to East Africa tend to exhibit greater dispersion in productive traits—education, ability, and labor supply—channels that appear to mediate the relationship between ancestral diversity and inequality.
31580.zh_abstract: 为什么不平等在不同社会之间存在差异？为什么有些社会比其他社会更不平等？我们提出假设：在市场经济中，收入差异反映了生产性特征的变异，跨社会不平等差异的很大一部分可能反映了社会内部多样性程度的持久差异，这种差异根植于史前“走出非洲”的迁徙。美国人口内部的不平等模式与这一假设一致，表明来自不同祖先社会的群体之间的差异，与这些社会内部生产性特征的多样性程度相关，这种多样性是在人类从非洲扩散过程中形成的。与提出的机制一致，祖先起源更靠近东非的人群，其生产性特征——教育、能力和劳动力供给——往往表现出更大的离散度，这些渠道似乎调节了祖先多样性与不平等之间的关系。

31579.title: Broadband Internet Access and Health Outcomes: Patient and Provider Responses in Medicare
31579.zh_title: 宽带互联网接入与健康结果：医疗保险中的患者和提供者响应
31579.authors: Jessica Van Parys, Zach Y. Brown
31579.abstract: High-speed internet has increased the amount of information available in health care markets. Online information may improve health outcomes if it reduces information frictions and helps patients choose higher quality providers or causes providers to improve quality. We examine how health outcomes for common procedures in Medicare changed after broadband internet rolled out across ZIP Codes from 1999 to 2008. Estimates imply that broadband expansion improved health outcomes by 5%. Broadband access primarily helped patients choose higher-quality providers; we also find some evidence that broadband improved provider quality. We use a structural model to decompose the improvements in patient outcomes over time. Counterfactual simulations imply that broadband roll-out was responsible for 16% of the improvement in outcomes by the end of the period.
31579.zh_abstract: 高速互联网增加了医疗保健市场中可用的信息量。如果在线信息减少了信息摩擦，帮助患者选择更高质量的提供者，或促使提供者提高质量，则可能改善健康结果。我们考察了1999年至2008年宽带互联网在邮政编码区推广后，医疗保险中常见手术的健康结果如何变化。估计表明，宽带扩展使健康结果改善了5%。宽带接入主要帮助患者选择更高质量的提供者；我们也发现一些证据表明宽带提高了提供者的质量。我们使用结构模型来分解患者结果随时间推移的改善。反事实模拟表明，到研究期末，宽带推广负责了结果改善的16%。

31578.title: Long Term Expectations and Aggregate Fluctuations
31578.authors: Pedro Bordalo, Nicola Gennaioli, Rafael La Porta, Matthew O'Brien, Andrei Shleifer
31578.abstract: In line with Keynes’ intuition, volatility in the stock market and in real economic activity are linked by expectations of long term profits. We show that analysts’ optimism about the long term earnings growth of S&P 500 firms is associated with a near term boom in major US financial markets, real investment, and other business cycle indicators. The same optimism however predicts disappointing earnings growth and a contraction in financial markets and real activity one to two years later. Overreaction of measured long term profit expectations emerges as a promising mechanism for reconciling Shiller’s excess volatility puzzle with the business cycle.
31578.zh_abstract: 与凯恩斯的直觉一致，股票市场和实际经济活动的波动通过长期利润预期联系在一起。我们表明，分析师对标普500公司长期盈利增长的乐观情绪，与美国主要金融市场的短期繁荣、实际投资以及其他商业周期指标相关。然而，同样的乐观情绪预测了一到两年后令人失望的盈利增长以及金融市场和实际活动的收缩。衡量的长期利润预期的过度反应，成为调和席勒的过度波动之谜与商业周期的一个有前景的机制。
31578.meta: Programs：ME；JEL：E0, E32, E44, E7, G01, G10

31577.title: Did the U.S. Really Grow Out of Its World War II Debt?
31577.zh_title: 美国真的通过经济增长摆脱了二战债务吗？
31577.abstract: The fall in the U.S. public debt/GDP ratio from 106% in 1946 to 23% in 1974 is often attributed to high rates of economic growth. This paper examines the roles of three other factors: primary budget surpluses, surprise inflation, and pegged interest rates before the Fed-Treasury Accord of 1951. Our central result is a simulation of the path that the debt/GDP ratio would have followed with primary budget balance and without the distortions in real interest rates caused by surprise inflation and the pre-Accord peg. In this counterfactual, debt/GDP declines only to 74% in 1974, not 23% as in actual history. Moreover, the ratio starts rising again in 1980 and in 2022 it is 84%. These findings imply that, over the last 76 years, only a small amount of debt reduction has been achieved through growth rates that exceed undistorted interest rates.
31577.zh_abstract: 美国公共债务与GDP之比从1946年的106%下降到1974年的23%，这一现象常被归因于高经济增长率。本文考察了另外三个因素的作用：初级预算盈余、意外通胀以及1951年美联储-财政部协议前的利率管制。我们的核心结果是对债务/GDP比率路径的模拟，该路径假设初级预算平衡，且不存在由意外通胀和协议前利率管制导致的实际利率扭曲。在这种反事实情景下，债务/GDP比率在1974年仅降至74%，而非实际历史中的23%。此外，该比率在1980年再次上升，到2022年达到84%。这些发现意味着，在过去76年里，通过超过未扭曲利率的经济增长率实现的债务削减量很小。
31577.meta: Programs：EFG, ME, PE；JEL：E31, E43, E65, H60, H63

31576.title: The Changing Skill Content of Private Sector Union Coverage
31576.zh_title: 私营部门工会覆盖范围的技能内容变化
31576.authors: Samuel Dodini, Michael F. Lovenheim, Alexander Willén
31576.abstract: Concurrent with the precipitous decline in private sector unionization over the past half century, there has been a shift in the type of work covered by unions. We take a skill-based approach to studying this shift, using data from the Current Population Survey combined with occupation-specific task requirements from the Dictionary of Occupational Titles and the Occupational Information Network. We partition skills into four groups based on two dimensions of task requirements: non-routine cognitive, non-routine manual, routine cognitive, and routine manual. For both men and women, private sector unionized jobs have changed to require more non-routine, cognitive skills and for women, less routine/manual skills. Union, non-union skill differences have grown, with unionized jobs requiring relatively more non-routine cognitive skill for both groups but also relatively more routine skills. We decompose these skill changes into: (1) changes in skills within an occupation, (2) changes in worker concentration across existing occupations, and (3) changes to the occupational mix from entry and exit. Most of the skill changes we document are driven by the second two forces. Finally, we discuss how this evidence can be reconciled with a model of skill-biased technological change that explicitly accounts for the institutional framework surrounding collective bargaining.
31576.zh_abstract: 在过去半个世纪中，随着私营部门工会化率的急剧下降，工会所覆盖的工作类型也发生了转变。我们采用基于技能的方法来研究这种转变，使用的数据来自当前人口调查，并结合了《职业名称词典》和《职业信息网络》中特定职业的任务要求。我们根据任务要求的两个维度将技能分为四组：非常规认知、非常规操作、常规认知和常规操作。对于男性和女性而言，私营部门的工会工作已转变为需要更多非常规、认知技能，而对于女性来说，则减少了常规/操作技能。工会与非工会之间的技能差异已经扩大，工会工作对两个群体都要求相对更多的非常规认知技能，同时也要求相对更多的常规技能。我们将这些技能变化分解为：(1) 职业内部技能的变化，(2) 现有职业间工人集中度的变化，以及 (3) 由职业进入和退出导致的职业组合变化。我们记录的大部分技能变化都是由后两种力量驱动的。最后，我们讨论了这些证据如何与一个明确考虑集体谈判制度框架的技能偏向型技术变革模型相协调。

31575.title: The Value of Intermediaries for GSE Loans
31575.zh_title: 政府赞助企业贷款中介的价值
31575.authors: Joshua Bosshardt, Ali Kakhbod, Amir Kermani
31575.abstract: We analyze the costs and benefits of intermediaries for government-sponsored enterprise (GSE) mortgages using regulatory data. We find evidence of lenders pricing for observable and unobservable default risk independently from the GSEs. We then develop and estimate a model of competitive lending in which lenders have skin-in-the-game. Lenders reduce costs by acquiring information beyond the GSEs’ criteria but charge markups. On net, interest rates are higher compared to a counterfactual in which the GSEs’ criteria are implemented passively. In an extension, the observed differences between banks and nonbanks are more consistent with differences in their skin-in-the-game rather than screening quality.
31575.zh_abstract: 我们利用监管数据分析了政府赞助企业抵押贷款中介的成本和收益。我们发现有证据表明，贷款机构独立于政府赞助企业，对可观测和不可观测的违约风险进行定价。然后，我们开发并估计了一个贷款机构具有风险共担机制的竞争性贷款模型。贷款机构通过获取超出政府赞助企业标准的信息来降低成本，但会收取加价。总体而言，与政府赞助企业标准被动实施的反事实情景相比，利率更高。在扩展分析中，银行与非银行机构之间的观察差异更符合它们在风险共担机制上的差异，而非筛选质量的差异。

31574.title: Accounting for Environmental Activity: Measuring Public Environmental Expenditures and the Environmental Goods and Services Sector in the US
31574.zh_title: 环境活动核算：衡量美国公共环境支出与环境商品和服务部门
31574.authors: Dennis Fixler, Julie L. Hass, Tina Highfill, Kelly M. Wentland, Scott A. Wentland
31574.abstract: How much of the economy is focused on protecting, rehabilitating, or managing the environment? To answer this question, we develop a proof-of-concept environmental activity account to quantify the environmental goods and services sector (EGSS) in the United States. Methodologically, we employ a satellite account approach similar to the method used by the US Bureau of Economic Analysis (BEA) to quantify other sectors of the economy (e.g., Outdoor Recreation Account, Marine Economy Account) while following the accounting principles and methods outlined in the SEEA Central Framework (SEEA-CF). This approach draws on detailed internal supply-use data, drawn primarily from Census’s Industry and Product data along with other supplemental sources. Overall, we estimate gross output of the EGSS was $\$725$ billion in 2019, or about 1.9% of the total gross output of the US economy. Government expenditures (across all levels) comprise a substantial portion of the EGSS in the US, as the public sector accounted for about 27% of total EGSS output ($\$197$ billion) in 2019. Although these estimates are still preliminary and are not official statistics, the goals of this research are to provide new insights into classification and measurement challenges in producing environmental activity accounts more generally, while also documenting data gaps and accounting issues in the US context more specifically.
31574.zh_abstract: 经济中有多少部分专注于保护、修复或管理环境？为了回答这个问题，我们开发了一个概念验证的环境活动账户，以量化美国的环境商品和服务部门。在方法上，我们采用了类似于美国经济分析局用于量化其他经济部门（例如，户外休闲账户、海洋经济账户）的卫星账户方法，同时遵循《环境经济核算体系中心框架》中概述的核算原则和方法。这种方法利用了详细的内部供给-使用数据，这些数据主要来自人口普查局的行业和产品数据以及其他补充来源。总体而言，我们估计2019年环境商品和服务部门的总产出为7250亿美元，约占美国经济总产出的1.9%。各级政府支出在美国环境商品和服务部门中占很大比重，2019年公共部门约占环境商品和服务部门总产出的27%（1970亿美元）。尽管这些估计仍是初步的，并非官方统计数据，但本研究的目标是为更普遍地编制环境活动账户时面临的分类和衡量挑战提供新见解，同时更具体地记录美国背景下的数据缺口和核算问题。
31574.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG；JEL：E01, M41, O44, Q50, Q56

31573.title: On the Source and Instability of Probability Weighting
31573.zh_title: 论概率加权的来源与不稳定性
31573.abstract: We propose and experimentally test a new theory of probability distortions in risky choice. The theory is based on a core principle from neuroscience called efficient coding, which states that information is encoded more accurately for those stimuli that the agent expects to encounter more frequently. As the agent’s prior beliefs vary, the model predicts that probability distortions change systematically. We provide novel experimental evidence consistent with this prediction by manipulating and measuring a subject’s prior beliefs. The data reveal that lottery valuations are more sensitive to probabilities that occur more frequently under the subject’s reported prior beliefs.
31573.zh_abstract: 我们提出并通过实验检验了一个关于风险选择中概率扭曲的新理论。该理论基于神经科学的一个核心原则，即高效编码，该原则指出，对于主体预期更频繁遇到的刺激，其信息编码会更准确。随着主体先验信念的变化，该模型预测概率扭曲会系统地改变。我们通过操纵和测量受试者的先验信念，提供了与这一预测一致的新实验证据。数据显示，彩票估值对受试者报告的先验信念中出现频率更高的概率更为敏感。

31572.title: Skills, Majors, and Jobs: Does Higher Education Respond?
31572.zh_title: 技能、专业与工作：高等教育是否做出回应？
31572.authors: Johnathan G. Conzelmann, Steven W. Hemelt, Brad Hershbein, Shawn M. Martin, Andrew Simon, Kevin M. Stange
31572.abstract: How do college students and postsecondary institutions react to changes in skill demand in the U.S. labor market? We quantify the magnitude and nature of response in the 4-year sector using a new measure of labor demand at the institution-major level that combines online job ads with geographic locations of alumni from a professional networking platform. Within a shift-share setup, we find that the 4-year sector responds. We estimate elasticities for undergraduate degrees and credits centered around 1.3, generally increasing with time horizon. Changes in non-tenure-track faculty allocations and the credits they teach partially mediate this overall response. We provide further evidence that the magnitude of the overall response depends on both student demand and institutional supply-side constraints. Our findings illuminate the nature of educational production in higher education and suggest that policy efforts that aim to align human capital investment with labor demand may struggle to achieve such goals if they target only one side of the market.
31572.zh_abstract: 大学生和高等教育机构如何应对美国劳动力市场技能需求的变化？我们利用一种新的机构-专业层面劳动力需求衡量指标，该指标结合了在线招聘广告和来自专业社交网络平台的校友地理位置信息，量化了四年制大学部门的反应幅度和性质。在份额-转移分析框架内，我们发现四年制大学部门确实做出了回应。我们估计本科学位和学分的弹性约为1.3，且通常随时间跨度增加而增大。非终身教职教师分配及其所授学分的变化部分中介了这一总体反应。我们进一步提供证据表明，总体反应的幅度取决于学生需求和机构供给侧的约束。我们的发现揭示了高等教育中教育生产的性质，并表明旨在使人力资本投资与劳动力需求相一致的政策努力，如果只针对市场的一方，可能难以实现其目标。

31571.title: How to Fund Unemployment Insurance with Informality and False Claims: Evidence From Senegal
31571.zh_title: 在存在非正规就业和虚假索赔的情况下如何为失业保险提供资金：来自塞内加尔的证据
31571.authors: Abdoulaye Ndiaye, Kyle F. Herkenhoff, Abdoulaye Cisse, Alessandro Dell'Acqua, Ahmadou Aly Mbaye
31571.abstract: This paper studies the welfare effects from the provision of unemployment insurance (UI) benefits in a context where formal workers represent only a small proportion of the labor market and informal workers can submit fraudulent claims for UI benefits. We model these features and allow for varying degrees of enforcement and different funding sources. We then estimate the model’s key parameters by conducting a custom labor force survey in Senegal. Our findings show that the liquidity gains are large and the moral hazard response to the UI benefits among workers is relatively small: an extra dollar of UI benefits yields a consumption-equivalent gain of 60–90 cents, which exceeds comparable estimates from U.S. calibrations by a factor of three to sixteen. We then show that the welfare gains depend on the program design: UI funded through payroll taxes delivers the greatest welfare gains but becomes infeasible when there are few formal workers and high rates of fraudulent claims. On the other hand, UI funded through consumption taxes delivers lower welfare gains but remains feasible with high informality and false claims.
31571.zh_abstract: 本文研究了在正规工人仅占劳动力市场一小部分且非正规工人可以提交虚假失业保险索赔的背景下，提供失业保险福利的福利效应。我们对这些特征进行建模，并允许不同程度的执法和不同的资金来源。然后，我们通过在塞内加尔进行一项定制劳动力调查来估计模型的关键参数。我们的研究结果表明，流动性收益很大，而工人对失业保险福利的道德风险反应相对较小：额外一美元的失业保险福利产生的消费等价收益为60-90美分，这比美国校准中的可比估计值高出三到十六倍。然后，我们表明福利收益取决于项目设计：通过工资税资助的失业保险带来最大的福利收益，但当正规工人很少且虚假索赔率很高时变得不可行。另一方面，通过消费税资助的失业保险带来的福利收益较低，但在高非正规就业和虚假索赔的情况下仍然可行。
31571.meta: Programs：EFG, LS；JEL：E0, E24, H21, J65, O10, O55

31559.title: Monitoring for Waste: Evidence from Medicare Audits
31559.zh_title: 浪费监控：来自医疗保险审计的证据
31559.abstract: This paper examines the tradeoffs of monitoring for wasteful public spending. By penalizing unnecessary spending, monitoring improves the quality of public expenditure and incentivizes firms to invest in compliance technology. I study a large Medicare program that monitored for unnecessary healthcare spending and consider its effect on government savings, provider behavior, and patient health. Every dollar Medicare spent on monitoring generated $\$24$–29 in government savings. The majority of savings stem from the deterrence of future care, rather than reclaimed payments from prior care. I do not find evidence that the health of the marginal patient is harmed, indicating that monitoring primarily deters low-value care. Monitoring does increase provider administrative costs, but these costs are mostly incurred upfront and include investments in technology to assess the medical necessity of care.
31559.zh_abstract: 本文考察了监控浪费性公共支出的权衡。通过惩罚不必要的支出，监控提高了公共支出的质量，并激励企业投资于合规技术。我研究了一个监控不必要医疗支出的大型医疗保险项目，并考虑其对政府储蓄、提供者行为和患者健康的影响。医疗保险在监控上每花费1美元，就能产生24至29美元的政府储蓄。大部分储蓄源于对未来护理的威慑，而非对先前护理的追回款项。我没有发现边际患者健康受到损害的证据，这表明监控主要威慑了低价值护理。监控确实增加了提供者的行政成本，但这些成本大部分是前期投入的，包括投资于评估护理医疗必要性的技术。
31559.meta: Programs：EH；JEL：H0, H00, H5, H50, H51, H53, H57, I0, I00, I1, I10, I11, I13, I18

31599.title: Global Capital Allocation
31599.authors: Sergio Florez-Orrego, Matteo Maggiori, Jesse Schreger, Ziwen Sun, Serdil Tinda
31599.abstract: We survey the literature on global capital allocation. We begin by reviewing the rise of cross-border investment, the shift towards portfolio investment, and the literature focusing on aggregate patterns in multilateral and bilateral positions. We then turn to the recent literature that uses micro-data to document patterns in global capital allocations. We focus on the importance of the currency of denomination of assets in international portfolios and the role that tax havens and offshore financial centers play in intermediating global capital. We conclude with directions for future research in this area.
31599.zh_abstract: 我们综述了关于全球资本配置的文献。首先回顾跨境投资的兴起、向组合投资的转变，以及关注多边和双边头寸总体模式的文献。然后转向近期利用微观数据记录全球资本配置模式的文献。我们重点关注资产计价货币在国际投资组合中的重要性，以及避税天堂和离岸金融中心在全球资本中介中的作用。最后，我们提出该领域未来研究的方向。
31599.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, ITI, ME；JEL：F0, F3, F30

31598.title: Women and the Econometrics of Family Trees
31598.zh_title: 女性与家庭树计量经济学
31598.authors: José-Antonio Espín-Sánchez, Joseph P. Ferrie, Christopher Vickers
31598.abstract: We present an econometric structure for the analysis of intergenerational mobility that integrates non-linearities, the role of maternal-side effects and the impact of grandparents. We show how previously estimated models are special cases of this general framework and what specific assumptions each embeds. Our analysis of linked U. S. data 1900-40 reveals the extent to which inadequate consideration of assortative mating and the impact of mothers produces misleading conclusions.
31598.zh_abstract: 我们提出一个用于分析代际流动性的计量经济学结构，该结构整合了非线性、母系效应的影响以及祖父母的作用。我们展示了先前估计的模型如何成为这一一般框架的特例，以及每个模型嵌入了哪些具体假设。我们对1900-1940年美国关联数据的分析揭示了，对选型婚配和母亲影响考虑不足会在多大程度上产生误导性结论。
31598.meta: Programs：DAE, LS；JEL：C36, C50, J08, J12, J13, J62, N31, N32

31597.title: Antitrust Enforcement Increases Economic Activity
31597.zh_title: 反垄断执法促进经济活动
31597.authors: Tania Babina, Simcha Barkai, Jessica Jeffers, Ezra Karger, Ekaterina Volkova
31597.abstract: We hand-collect and standardize information describing all 3,055 antitrust lawsuits brought by the Department of Justice (DOJ) between 1971 and 2018. Using restricted establishment-level microdata from the U.S. Census, we compare the economic outcomes of a non-tradable industry in states targeted by DOJ antitrust lawsuits to outcomes of the same industry in other states that were not targeted. We document that DOJ antitrust enforcement actions permanently increase employment by 5.4% and business formation by 4.1%. Using an event-study design, we find (1) a sharp increase in payroll that exceeds the increase in employment, meaning that DOJ antitrust enforcement increases average wages, (2) an economically smaller increase in sales that is statistically insignificant, and (3) a precise increase in the labor share. While we cannot separately measure the quantity and price of output, the increase in production inputs (employment), together with a proportionally smaller increase in sales, strongly suggests that these DOJ antitrust enforcement actions increase the quantity of output and simultaneously decrease the price of output. Our results show that government antitrust enforcement leads to persistently higher levels of economic activity in targeted industries.
31597.zh_abstract: 我们手工收集并标准化了1971年至2018年间司法部提起的所有3055起反垄断诉讼的信息。利用美国人口普查局限制使用的企业层面微观数据，我们比较了受司法部反垄断诉讼针对的非贸易品行业在各州的经济结果，与同一行业在其他未受针对州的结果。我们记录到，司法部反垄断执法行动使就业永久性增加5.4%，企业创建增加4.1%。通过事件研究设计，我们发现：(1) 工资总额急剧增加，且超过就业增长，意味着司法部反垄断执法提高了平均工资；(2) 销售额在经济上较小的增加在统计上不显著；(3) 劳动份额精确增加。虽然我们无法分别衡量产出的数量和价格，但生产投入（就业）的增加，加上销售额比例较小的增长，强烈表明这些司法部反垄断执法行动增加了产出数量，同时降低了产出价格。我们的结果表明，政府反垄断执法导致目标行业的经济活动持续处于更高水平。
31597.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, IO, LE, LS, POL, PR；JEL：E24, J21, K21, L4, L40

31596.title: The Zero-Beta Interest Rate
31596.authors: Sebastian Di Tella, Benjamin M. Hébert, Pablo Kurlat, Qitong Wang
31596.abstract: We use equity returns to construct a time-varying measure of the interest rate that we call the zero-beta rate: the expected return of a stock portfolio orthogonal to the stochastic discount factor. The zero-beta rate is high and volatile. In contrast to safe rates, the zero-beta rate fits the aggregate consumption Euler equation remarkably well, both unconditionally and conditional on monetary shocks, and can explain the level and volatility of asset prices. We claim that the zero-beta rate is the correct intertemporal price.
31596.zh_abstract: 我们利用股票收益率构建了一个随时间变化的利率度量，称为零贝塔利率：一个与随机贴现因子正交的股票投资组合的预期收益率。零贝塔利率高且波动剧烈。与安全利率相反，零贝塔利率在无条件情况下和货币冲击条件下，都与总消费欧拉方程拟合得非常好，并能解释资产价格的水平与波动性。我们主张零贝塔利率是正确的跨期价格。

31595.title: The Impact of Bretton Woods International Capital Controls on the Global Economy and the Value of Geopolitical Stability: A General Equilibrium Analysis
31595.zh_title: 布雷顿森林国际资本管制对全球经济的影响及地缘政治稳定的价值：一般均衡分析
31595.authors: Lee E. Ohanian, Paulina Restrepo-Echavarria, Diana Van Patten, Mark L.J. Wright
31595.abstract: This paper quantifies the positive and normative impact of Bretton Woods capital controls on global and regional economic activity. A three-region DSGE capital flows accounting framework consisting of the U.S., Western Europe, and the Rest of the World (ROW) is developed to quantify capital controls and evaluate their impact on the world economy. We find these controls had large effects. Counterfactual analysis show world output would have been 0:5 percent higher had there been perfect capital mobility, with substantial capital flowing from the ROW to the U.S. Bretton Woods capital controls raised welfare substantially in the ROW, but at the expense of much lower U.S. welfare. Given the U.S.’s goal of keeping capital within these countries to preserve their stability during this period, we interpret lower U.S. welfare due to Bretton Woods as the implicit value the U.S. placed on preserving geopolitical stability in ally countries during the Cold War.
31595.zh_abstract: 本文量化了布雷顿森林资本管制对全球和区域经济活动的正面及规范影响。我们构建了一个包含美国、西欧和世界其他地区三个区域的一般动态随机均衡资本流核算框架，以量化资本管制并评估其对世界经济的影响。我们发现这些管制产生了巨大影响。反事实分析表明，如果存在完全的资本流动性，世界产出将高出0.5%，大量资本将从世界其他地区流向美国。布雷顿森林资本管制大幅提高了世界其他地区的福利，但以美国福利大幅降低为代价。鉴于美国在此期间的目标是将资本保留在这些国家以维护其稳定，我们将布雷顿森林体系导致的美国福利降低，解释为美国在冷战期间为维护盟国地缘政治稳定所赋予的隐性价值。

31594.title: Do Cops Know Who to Stop? Assessing Optimizing Models of Police Behavior with a Natural Experiment
31594.zh_title: 警察知道该拦停谁吗？利用自然实验评估警察行为的优化模型
31594.authors: David Abrams, Hanming Fang, Priyanka Goonetilleke
31594.abstract: The standard economic model of police stops implies that the contraband hit rate should rise when the number of stops or searches per officer falls, ceteris paribus. We provide empirical corroboration of such optimizing models of police behavior by examining changes in stops and frisks around two extraordinary events of 2020: the COVID-19 pandemic onset and the nationwide protests following the killing of George Floyd. We find that hit rates from pedestrian and vehicle stops generally rose as stops and frisks fell dramatically. Using detailed data, we are able to rule out a number of alternative explanations, including changes in street population, crime, police allocation, and policing intensity. We find mixed evidence about the changes in racial disparities, and evidence that police stops do not decrease crime, at least in the short run. The results are robust to a number of different specifications. Our findings provide quantitative estimates that can contribute to the important goals of improving and reforming policing.
31594.zh_abstract: 标准的警察拦停经济模型意味着，在其他条件不变的情况下，当每位警官的拦停或搜查次数下降时，违禁品查获率应上升。我们通过考察2020年两起特殊事件（新冠疫情爆发和乔治·弗洛伊德被杀后的全国抗议）前后拦停与搜身的变化，为这种警察行为优化模型提供了实证支持。我们发现，随着拦停和搜身大幅减少，行人及车辆拦停的查获率普遍上升。利用详细数据，我们能够排除一系列替代解释，包括街头人口变化、犯罪变化、警力分配和警务强度变化。关于种族差异变化的证据不一，且有证据表明警察拦停至少在短期内不会减少犯罪。结果对多种不同设定均保持稳健。我们的发现提供了定量估计，有助于实现改善和改革警务的重要目标。

31593.title: Seasonal Allergies and Accidents
31593.abstract: Seasonal allergies affect over 400 million people globally, yet the broader economic consequences of pollen exposure remain understudied. Evidence from Japan’s ambulance records suggests that high-pollen days are associated with increases in accidents, including traffic accidents and work-related injuries, which may reflect impaired cognitive performance. Retail scanner data and cellphone mobility records indicate that individuals already engage in avoidance behaviors, such as purchasing allergy products and limiting outdoor activities on weekends. This suggests that relying on individual self-protection may be insufficient to offset these risks, and thus greater government intervention may be warranted to mitigate pollen-related harm.
31593.zh_abstract: 季节性过敏影响全球超过4亿人，然而花粉暴露更广泛的经济后果仍未得到充分研究。来自日本救护车记录的证据表明，高花粉日与事故（包括交通事故和工伤）的增加相关，这可能反映了认知能力的下降。零售扫描数据和手机移动记录显示，个体已经采取了回避行为，例如购买抗过敏产品以及在周末限制户外活动。这表明依赖个人自我保护可能不足以抵消这些风险，因此可能需要更多的政府干预来减轻花粉相关的危害。
31593.meta: Programs：AG, EEE, EH, LS, PE, PR；JEL：I12, J24, Q51, Q53, Q54

31568.title: Causal Effects of Renewable Portfolio Standards on Renewable Investments and Generation: The Role of Heterogeneity and Dynamics
31568.zh_title: 可再生能源组合标准对可再生能源投资与发电的因果效应：异质性与动态性的作用
31568.authors: Olivier Deschenes, Christopher Malloy, Gavin G. McDonald
31568.abstract: Despite a 30-year long history, Renewable Portfolio Standards (RPS) remain controversial and debates continue to surround their efficacy in leading the low-carbon transition in the electricity sector. Contributing to the ongoing debates is the lack of definitive causal evidence on their impact on investments in renewable capacity and generation. This paper provides the most detailed analysis to date of the impact of RPSs on renewable electricity capacity investments and on generation. We use state-level data from 1990-2019 and recent econometric methods designed to address dynamic and heterogeneous treatment effects in a staggered adoption panel data design. We find that, on average, RPS policies increase wind generation capacity by 600-1200 MW, a 44% increase, but have no significant effect on investments in solar capacity. Additionally, we demonstrate that RPSs have slow dynamic effects: most of the capacity additions occur 5 years after RPS implementation. Estimates for wind and solar electricity generation mimic those for capacity investments. We also find similar results using an alternate treatment definition that allows states to meet their RPS requirements with pre-existing renewable generation and renewable generation from nearby states.
31568.zh_abstract: 尽管可再生能源组合标准已有30多年的历史，但其仍存在争议，关于其在引领电力行业低碳转型方面的有效性争论持续不断。导致这些争论的原因之一是缺乏关于其对可再生能源装机容量投资和发电量影响的明确因果证据。本文提供了迄今为止关于可再生能源组合标准对可再生能源电力装机容量投资和发电量影响的最详细分析。我们使用了1990年至2019年的州级数据，以及旨在处理交错采用面板数据设计中动态和异质性处理效应的最新计量经济学方法。我们发现，平均而言，可再生能源组合标准政策使风电装机容量增加了600-1200兆瓦，增幅达44%，但对太阳能装机容量的投资没有显著影响。此外，我们证明了可再生能源组合标准具有缓慢的动态效应：大部分装机容量增加发生在政策实施5年后。风电和太阳能发电量的估计结果与装机容量投资的结果相似。当我们使用另一种处理定义（允许各州利用已有的可再生能源发电量以及来自邻近州的可再生能源发电量来满足其可再生能源组合标准要求）时，也得到了类似的结果。
